limitations: 可能依赖特定LM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
两阶段训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EduEmbed框架，通过微调语言模型增强学习者-项目认知建模中的嵌入表示，解决语义对齐与统一集成问题。

papers.title: LAA-X: Unified Localized Artifact Attention for Quality-Agnostic and Generalizable Face Forgery Detection
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose Localized Artifact Attention X (LAA-X), a novel deepfake detection framework that is both robust to high-quality forgeries and capable of generalizing to unseen manipulations. Existing approaches typically rely on binary classifiers coupled with implicit attention mechanisms, which often fail to generalize beyond known manipulations. In contrast, LAA-X introduces an explicit attention strategy based on a multi-task learning framework combined with blending-based data synthesis. Auxiliary tasks are designed to guide the model toward localized, artifact-prone (i.e., vulnerable) regions. The proposed framework is compatible with both CNN and transformer backbones, resulting in two different versions, namely, LAA-Net and LAA-Former, respectively. Despite being trained only on real and pseudo-fake samples, LAA-X competes with state-of-the-art methods across multiple benchmarks. Code and pre-trained weights for LAA-Net\footnote{https://github.com/10Ring/LAA-Net} and LAA-Former\footnote{https://github.com/10Ring/LAA-Former} are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAA-X框架，通过显式注意力机制和多任务学习提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法依赖二元分类器和隐式注意力机制，难以泛化到未知伪造类型，尤其对高质量伪造鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个对高质量伪造鲁棒且能泛化到未见操作的深度伪造检测框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LAA-X框架，基于多任务学习和混合数据合成，引入显式注意力策略引导模型关注局部易伪造区域；兼容CNN和Transformer骨干，得到LAA-Net和LAA-Former两个版本。
contributions: 提出显式局部伪影注意力机制，提升对高质量伪造的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
设计多任务学习框架与混合数据合成，仅用真实和伪伪造样本训练即可达到SOTA。
开源LAA-Net和LAA-Former的代码与预训练权重。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，LAA-X与SOTA方法竞争，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据合成策略，对极端伪造类型泛化性待验证。
多任务学习可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAA-X框架，通过显式注意力机制和多任务学习提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: Parent Selection Mechanisms in Elitist Crossover-Based Algorithms
papers.abstract: Parent selection methods are widely used in evolutionary computation to accelerate the optimization process, yet their theoretical benefits are still poorly understood. In this paper, we address this gap by proposing a parent selection strategy for the $(μ+1)$ genetic algorithm (GA) that prioritizes the selection of maximally distant parents for crossover. We show that, with an appropriately chosen population size, the resulting algorithm solves the Jump$_k$ problem in $O(k4^kn\log(n))$ expected time. This bound is significantly smaller than the best known bound of $O(nμ\log(μ)+n\log(n)+n^{k-1})$ for any $(μ+1)$~GA using no explicit diversity-preserving mechanism and a constant crossover probability. To establish this result, we introduce a novel diversity metric that captures both the maximum distance between pairs of individuals in the population and the number of pairs achieving this distance. The main novelty of our analysis is that it relies on crossover as a mechanism for creating and maintaining diversity throughout the run, rather than using crossover only in the final step to combine already diversified individuals. The insights provided by our analysis contribute to a deeper theoretical understanding of the role of crossover in the population dynamics of genetic algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种优先选择最远父代进行交叉的精英选择策略，显著降低了Jump_k问题的期望运行时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 父代选择方法在进化计算中广泛使用，但其理论优势仍不明确，缺乏严格的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 如何设计父代选择策略以理论可证明地加速遗传算法优化，特别是针对跳跃函数问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种优先选择最大距离父代进行交叉的父代选择策略，并引入新的多样性度量来捕捉种群中个体间的最大距离及达到该距离的对数。
contributions: 提出一种新的父代选择策略，优先选择最远父代进行交叉，并证明其能显著降低Jump_k问题的期望运行时间。
引入新的多样性度量，并证明交叉在运行过程中创造和维持多样性的作用，而非仅在最后一步。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析仅针对Jump_k问题，可能不适用于其他问题。
需要适当选择种群大小，实际应用中可能难以确定。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种优先选择最远父代进行交叉的精英选择策略，显著降低了Jump_k问题的期望运行时间。

papers.title: Intelligent Traffic Monitoring with YOLOv11: A Case Study in Real-Time Vehicle Detection
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in computer vision, driven by artificial intelligence, have significantly enhanced monitoring systems. One notable application is traffic monitoring, which leverages computer vision alongside deep learning-based object detection and counting. We present an offline, real-time traffic monitoring system that couples a pre-trained YOLOv11 detector with BoT-SORT/ByteTrack for multi-object tracking, implemented in PyTorch/OpenCV and wrapped in a Qt-based desktop UI. The CNN pipeline enables efficient vehicle detection and counting from video streams without cloud dependencies. Across diverse scenes, the system achieves (66.67-95.83%) counting accuracy. Class-wise detection yields high precision (cars: 0.97-1.00; trucks: 1.00) with strong recall (cars: 0.82-1.00; trucks: 0.70-1.00), resulting in F1 scores of (0.90-1.00 for cars and 0.82-1.00 for trucks). While adverse weather conditions may negatively impact this performance, results remain robust in typical conditions. By integrating lightweight models with an accessible, cloud-independent interface, this paper contributes to the modernization and development of future smart cities by showing the capacity of AI-driven traffic monitoring systems.

analysis.tldr: 基于YOLOv11和BoT-SORT/ByteTrack的离线实时交通监控系统，在车辆检测与计数上取得高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统交通监控依赖云端或重型模型，实时性差且部署成本高，需要轻量、离线的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 设计一个无需云端依赖、实时且准确的车辆检测与计数系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用预训练YOLOv11检测器结合BoT-SORT/ByteTrack多目标跟踪，在PyTorch/OpenCV中实现，并封装为Qt桌面应用。
contributions: 提出一个离线、实时的交通监控系统，集成YOLOv11与多目标跟踪。
在多种场景下验证了系统的高计数准确率（66.67%-95.83%）和类别级高精度/召回率。
analysis.experiments: 在多样场景下测试，计数准确率66.67%-95.83%，车辆检测F1分数0.82-1.00。
limitations: 恶劣天气下性能可能下降。
未提及与其他先进方法的对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于YOLOv11和BoT-SORT/ByteTrack的离线实时交通监控系统，在车辆检测与计数上取得高精度。

papers.title: BAAI Cardiac Agent: An intelligent multimodal agent for automated reasoning and diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases from cardiac magnetic resonance imaging
papers.abstract: Cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR) is a cornerstone for diagnosing cardiovascular disease. However, it remains underutilized due to complex, time-consuming interpretation across multi-sequences, phases, quantitative measures that heavily reliant on specialized expertise. Here, we present BAAI Cardiac Agent, a multimodal intelligent system designed for end-to-end CMR interpretation. The agent integrates specialized cardiac expert models to perform automated segmentation of cardiac structures, functional quantification, tissue characterization and disease diagnosis, and generates structured clinical reports within a unified workflow. Evaluated on CMR datasets from two hospitals (2413 patients) spanning 7-types of major cardiovascular diseases, the agent achieved an area under the receiver-operating-characteristic curve exceeding 0.93 internally and 0.81 externally. In the task of estimating left ventricular function indices, the results generated by this system for core parameters such as ejection fraction, stroke volume, and left ventricular mass are highly consistent with clinical reports, with Pearson correlation coefficients all exceeding 0.90. The agent outperformed state-of-the-art models in segmentation and diagnostic tasks, and generated clinical reports showing high concordance with expert radiologists (six readers across three experience levels). By dynamically orchestrating expert models for coordinated multimodal analysis, this agent framework enables accurate, efficient CMR interpretation and highlights its potentials for complex clinical imaging workflows. Code is available at https://github.com/plantain-herb/Cardiac-Agent.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多模态智能体系统，用于心脏磁共振成像的自动分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 心脏磁共振（CMR）是诊断心血管疾病的基石，但由于多序列、多相位、定量测量的复杂性和耗时性，且高度依赖专业专家，导致其利用率不足。
analysis.problem: 实现CMR的端到端自动解读，包括心脏结构分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成专门的心脏专家模型，在统一工作流中自动执行分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。
contributions: 提出了一个多模态智能体系统BAAI Cardiac Agent，用于CMR的端到端自动解读。
在两家医院2413名患者的数据集上，对7种主要心血管疾病的诊断AUC超过0.93（内部）和0.81（外部），左心室功能指标与临床报告高度一致（Pearson r>0.90）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个医院数据集（2413名患者）上评估，涵盖7种主要心血管疾病，诊断AUC内部>0.93、外部>0.81；左心室功能指标（射血分数、每搏输出量、左心室质量）与临床报告的Pearson相关系数均>0.90；在分割和诊断任务上优于现有模型；生成的临床报告与不同经验水平的放射科医生高度一致。
limitations: 外部验证AUC（0.81）低于内部，泛化性可能有限。
仅针对CMR模态，未涉及其他影像或临床数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多模态智能体系统，用于心脏磁共振成像的自动分割、功能量化、组织表征和疾病诊断，并生成结构化临床报告。

papers.title: FactReview: Evidence-Grounded Reviews with Literature Positioning and Execution-Based Claim Verification
papers.abstract: Peer review in machine learning is under growing pressure from rising submission volume and limited reviewer time. Most LLM-based reviewing systems read only the manuscript and generate comments from the paper's own narrative. This makes their outputs sensitive to presentation quality and leaves them weak when the evidence needed for review lies in related work or released code. We present FactReview, an evidence-grounded reviewing system that combines claim extraction, literature positioning, and execution-based claim verification. Given a submission, FactReview identifies major claims and reported results, retrieves nearby work to clarify the paper's technical position, and, when code is available, executes the released repository under bounded budgets to test central empirical claims. It then produces a concise review and an evidence report that assigns each major claim one of five labels: Supported, Supported by the paper, Partially supported, In conflict, or Inconclusive. In a case study on CompGCN, FactReview reproduces results that closely match those reported for link prediction and node classification, yet also shows that the paper's broader performance claim across tasks is not fully sustained: on MUTAG graph classification, the reproduced result is 88.4%, whereas the strongest baseline reported in the paper remains 92.6%. The claim is therefore only partially supported. More broadly, this case suggests that AI is most useful in peer review not as a final decision-maker, but as a tool for gathering evidence and helping reviewers produce more evidence-grounded assessments. The code is public at https://github.com/DEFENSE-SEU/Review-Assistant.

analysis.tldr: FactReview 通过文献定位和代码执行验证论文声明，生成证据驱动的审稿报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 同行评审压力大，现有 LLM 审稿系统仅依赖论文自身叙述，易受表述质量影响且缺乏外部证据支持。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能结合文献定位和可执行代码验证的自动化审稿系统，以提供证据驱动的评审。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: FactReview 包含声明提取、文献定位和基于执行的声明验证三个模块，对每个主要声明给出五种标签之一。
contributions: 提出证据驱动的审稿系统 FactReview，结合文献定位和代码执行验证。
通过 CompGCN 案例展示了系统能发现论文声明不完全成立的情况。
analysis.experiments: 在 CompGCN 案例上，FactReview 复现了链接预测和节点分类的结果，但发现图分类声明仅部分支持（复现 88.4% vs 论文基线 92.6%）。
limitations: 依赖代码可用性和执行预算。
案例研究有限，未在大量论文上评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FactReview 通过文献定位和代码执行验证论文声明，生成证据驱动的审稿报告。

papers.title: Detecting Media Clones in Cultural Repositories Using a Positive Unlabeled Learning Approach
papers.abstract: We formulate curator-in-the-loop duplicate discovery in the AtticPOT repository as a Positive-Unlabeled (PU) learning problem. Given a single anchor per artefact, we train a lightweight per-query Clone Encoder on augmented views of the anchor and score the unlabeled repository with an interpretable threshold on the latent l_2 norm. The system proposes candidates for curator verification, uncovering cross-record duplicates that were not verified a priori. On CIFAR-10 we obtain F1=96.37 (AUROC=97.97); on AtticPOT we reach F1=90.79 (AUROC=98.99), improving F1 by +7.70 points over the best baseline (SVDD) under the same lightweight backbone. Qualitative "find-similar" panels show stable neighbourhoods across viewpoint and condition. The method avoids explicit negatives, offers a transparent operating point, and fits de-duplication, record linkage, and curator-in-the-loop workflows.

analysis.tldr: 将文化库中的媒体克隆检测建模为正无标签学习，提出轻量级克隆编码器，在AtticPOT数据集上F1达90.79。
analysis.research_motivation: 文化库中常存在跨记录的重复媒体（克隆），人工验证成本高，现有方法需要负样本或难以解释，亟需一种无需负样本、可解释且高效的重复发现方法。
analysis.problem: 在文化库中，给定一个锚点（anchor）媒体，如何从无标签库中检测出与其重复的克隆媒体，并支持策展人交互验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将问题建模为正无标签（PU）学习，对每个锚点训练一个轻量级克隆编码器（Clone Encoder），使用锚点的增强视图作为正样本，通过可解释的l2范数阈值对无标签库进行评分，提出候选重复项供策展人验证。
contributions: 首次将文化库中的媒体克隆检测形式化为PU学习问题，无需显式负样本。
提出轻量级克隆编码器，在CIFAR-10和AtticPOT上取得高F1和AUROC，且优于SVDD等基线。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10上F1=96.37，AUROC=97.97；在AtticPOT上F1=90.79，AUROC=98.99，比最佳基线SVDD提升F1 7.70个百分点。定性结果展示了稳定的邻域结构。
limitations: 方法依赖每个锚点单独训练编码器，可能在大规模库中计算开销较大。
阈值选择基于l2范数，可能对某些分布外的克隆不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将文化库中的媒体克隆检测建模为正无标签学习，提出轻量级克隆编码器，在AtticPOT数据集上F1达90.79。

papers.title: Extracting and Steering Emotion Representations in Small Language Models: A Methodological Comparison
papers.abstract: Small language models (SLMs) in the 100M-10B parameter range increasingly power production systems, yet whether they possess the internal emotion representations recently discovered in frontier models remains unknown. We present the first comparative analysis of emotion vector extraction methods for SLMs, evaluating 9 models across 5 architectural families (GPT-2, Gemma, Qwen, Llama, Mistral) using 20 emotions and two extraction methods (generation-based and comprehension-based). Generation-based extraction produces statistically superior emotion separation (Mann-Whitney p = 0.007; Cohen's d = -107.5), with the advantage modulated by instruction tuning and architecture. Emotion representations localize at middle transformer layers (~50% depth), following a U-shaped curve that is architecture-invariant from 124M to 3B parameters. We validate these findings against representational anisotropy baselines across 4 models and confirm causal behavioral effects through steering experiments, independently verified by an external emotion classifier (92% success rate, 37/40 scenarios). Steering reveals three regimes -- surgical (coherent text transformation), repetitive collapse, and explosive (text degradation) -- quantified by perplexity ratios and separated by model architecture rather than scale. We document cross-lingual emotion entanglement in Qwen, where steering activates semantically aligned Chinese tokens that RLHF does not suppress, raising safety concerns for multilingual deployment. This work provides methodological guidelines for emotion research on open-weight models and contributes to the Model Medicine series by bridging external behavioral profiling with internal representational analysis.

analysis.tldr: 比较小语言模型中情感表征的提取方法，发现生成式提取优于理解式，并验证了情感表征的因果行为效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿大模型被发现具有内部情感表征，但小语言模型（SLMs）是否拥有类似表征尚不清楚，且缺乏系统的方法论比较。
analysis.problem: 小语言模型中情感表征的提取方法缺乏系统性比较，且其因果行为效应未经验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感表征位于中间Transformer层（约50%深度），呈现架构不变的U形曲线；生成式提取产生统计上更优的情感分离；指令微调和架构调节提取优势；跨语言情感纠缠现象。
analysis.method: 比较基于生成和基于理解的两种情感向量提取方法，在9个模型（5种架构家族）上评估20种情感，并通过引导实验验证因果行为效应。
contributions: 首次对小语言模型的情感表征提取方法进行系统性比较分析
发现生成式提取优于理解式，并揭示情感表征的层定位和架构不变性
通过引导实验验证情感表征的因果行为效应，并识别三种引导模式
发现跨语言情感纠缠的安全隐患
analysis.experiments: 在9个模型（GPT-2, Gemma, Qwen, Llama, Mistral）上评估20种情感，使用两种提取方法，通过Mann-Whitney检验和Cohen's d量化分离效果，并在4个模型上验证各向异性基线，通过外部情感分类器（92%成功率）独立验证引导效果。
limitations: 仅关注情感表征，未涉及其他类型表征
引导实验可能受限于模型规模和架构多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 比较小语言模型中情感表征的提取方法，发现生成式提取优于理解式，并验证了情感表征的因果行为效应。

papers.title: 4C4D: 4 Camera 4D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: This paper tackles the challenge of recovering 4D dynamic scenes from videos captured by as few as four portable cameras. Learning to model scene dynamics for temporally consistent novel-view rendering is a foundational task in computer graphics, where previous works often require dense multi-view captures using camera arrays of dozens or even hundreds of views. We propose \textbf{4C4D}, a novel framework that enables high-fidelity 4D Gaussian Splatting from video captures of extremely sparse cameras. Our key insight lies that the geometric learning under sparse settings is substantially more difficult than modeling appearance. Driven by this observation, we introduce a Neural Decaying Function on Gaussian opacities for enhancing the geometric modeling capability of 4D Gaussians. This design mitigates the inherent imbalance between geometry and appearance modeling in 4DGS by encouraging the 4DGS gradients to focus more on geometric learning. Extensive experiments across sparse-view datasets with varying camera overlaps show that 4C4D achieves superior performance over prior art. Project page at: https://junshengzhou.github.io/4C4D.

analysis.tldr: 提出4C4D框架，仅用4个相机即可实现高保真4D动态场景重建和新视角渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统4D动态场景重建依赖密集多视角相机阵列（数十甚至上百个），成本高且部署困难，亟需从极稀疏视角恢复高质量动态场景的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从仅4个稀疏相机的视频中恢复高保真4D动态场景，实现时序一致的新视角渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏视角下几何学习比外观建模困难得多，导致4D高斯泼溅中几何与外观建模不平衡。
analysis.method: 在4D高斯泼溅中引入神经衰减函数（Neural Decaying Function）作用于高斯不透明度，引导梯度更关注几何学习，从而增强几何建模能力。
contributions: 提出4C4D框架，首次实现仅用4个便携相机进行高保真4D动态场景重建。
设计神经衰减函数，有效缓解稀疏视角下几何与外观建模的不平衡问题。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏视角数据集上（不同相机重叠度）进行实验，4C4D优于先前方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对相机运动或场景动态范围有隐式假设。
仅验证了4个相机的设置，更少相机或极端稀疏情况未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出4C4D框架，仅用4个相机即可实现高保真4D动态场景重建和新视角渲染。

papers.title: CoopGuard: Stateful Cooperative Agents Safeguarding LLMs Against Evolving Multi-Round Attacks
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in complex applications, their vulnerability to adversarial attacks raises urgent safety concerns, especially those evolving over multi-round interactions. Existing defenses are largely reactive and struggle to adapt as adversaries refine strategies across rounds. In this work, we propose CoopGuard , a stateful multi-round LLM defense framework based on cooperative agents that maintains and updates an internal defense state to counter evolving attacks. It employs three specialized agents (Deferring Agent, Tempting Agent, and Forensic Agent) for complementary round-level strategies, coordinated by System Agent, which conditions decisions on the evolving defense state (interaction history) and orchestrates agents over time. To evaluate evolving threats, we introduce the EMRA benchmark with 5,200 adversarial samples across 8 attack types, simulating progressively LLM multi-round attacks. Experiments show that CoopGuard reduces attack success rate by 78.9% over state-of-the-art defenses, while improving deceptive rate by 186% and reducing attack efficiency by 167.9%, offering a more comprehensive assessment of multi-round defense. These results demonstrate that CoopGuard provides robust protection for LLMs in multi-round adversarial scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于状态协同智能体的多轮LLM防御框架CoopGuard，显著降低攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在多轮交互中易受演化攻击，现有防御反应式且难以适应策略变化，亟需自适应防御。
analysis.problem: 多轮交互中LLM面对演化攻击的鲁棒性不足，缺乏状态感知的协同防御机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有防御在多轮攻击中表现被动，攻击者可逐步调整策略绕过检测。
analysis.method: 提出CoopGuard框架，包含三个专用智能体（延迟、诱惑、取证）和系统智能体，维护内部防御状态并协调策略。
contributions: 提出首个基于状态协同智能体的多轮LLM防御框架CoopGuard
构建EMRA基准，含5200个样本覆盖8种攻击类型
实验显示攻击成功率降低78.9%，欺骗率提升186%，攻击效率降低167.9%
analysis.experiments: 在EMRA基准上评估，与SOTA防御对比，攻击成功率降低78.9%，欺骗率提升186%，攻击效率降低167.9%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定攻击类型，泛化性需进一步验证
多智能体协作可能引入额外计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于状态协同智能体的多轮LLM防御框架CoopGuard，显著降低攻击成功率。

papers.title: DINO-VO: Learning Where to Focus for Enhanced State Estimation
papers.abstract: We present DINO Patch Visual Odometry (DINO-VO), an end-to-end monocular visual odometry system with strong scene generalization. Current Visual Odometry (VO) systems often rely on heuristic feature extraction strategies, which can degrade accuracy and robustness, particularly in large-scale outdoor environments. DINO-VO addresses these limitations by incorporating a differentiable adaptive patch selector into the end-to-end pipeline, improving the quality of extracted patches and enhancing generalization across diverse datasets. Additionally, our system integrates a multi-task feature extraction module with a differentiable bundle adjustment (BA) module that leverages inverse depth priors, enabling the system to learn and utilize appearance and geometric information effectively. This integration bridges the gap between feature learning and state estimation. Extensive experiments on the TartanAir, KITTI, Euroc, and TUM datasets demonstrate that DINO-VO exhibits strong generalization across synthetic, indoor, and outdoor environments, achieving state-of-the-art tracking accuracy.

analysis.tldr: DINO-VO 通过可微分自适应补丁选择器提升单目视觉里程计的场景泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉里程计系统依赖启发式特征提取策略，在大规模室外环境中精度和鲁棒性不足，且跨数据集泛化能力弱。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端单目视觉里程计系统，使其在多种场景下具有强泛化性和高精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DINO-VO，包含可微分自适应补丁选择器、多任务特征提取模块和可微分束调整模块，利用逆深度先验融合外观与几何信息。
contributions: 提出可微分自适应补丁选择器，提升特征提取质量和泛化能力。
集成多任务特征提取与可微分束调整，桥接特征学习与状态估计。
analysis.experiments: 在 TartanAir、KITTI、Euroc 和 TUM 数据集上实验，在合成、室内和室外环境中达到最先进跟踪精度。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或动态场景敏感。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DINO-VO 通过可微分自适应补丁选择器提升单目视觉里程计的场景泛化能力。

papers.title: TORA: Topological Representation Alignment for 3D Shape Assembly
papers.abstract: Flow-matching methods for 3D shape assembly learn point-wise velocity fields that transport parts toward assembled configurations, yet they receive no explicit guidance about which cross-part interactions should drive the motion. We introduce TORA, a topology-first representation alignment framework that distills relational structure from a frozen pretrained 3D encoder into the flow-matching backbone during training. We first realize this via simple instantiation, token-wise cosine matching, which injects the learned geometric descriptors from the teacher representation. We then extend to employ a Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) loss to match the similarity structure between student and teacher representations for enhanced topological alignment. Through systematic probing of diverse 3D encoders, we show that geometry- and contact-centric teacher properties, not semantic classification ability, govern alignment effectiveness, and that alignment is most beneficial at later transformer layers where spatial structure naturally emerges. TORA introduces zero inference overhead while yielding two consistent benefits: faster convergence (up to 6.9$\times$) and improved accuracy in-distribution, along with greater robustness under domain shift. Experiments on five benchmarks spanning geometric, semantic, and inter-object assembly demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with particularly pronounced gains in zero-shot transfer to unseen real-world and synthetic datasets. Project page: https://nahyuklee.github.io/tora.

analysis.tldr: 通过拓扑表示对齐提升3D形状组装的流匹配方法，实现更快收敛和更高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流匹配方法在3D形状组装中学习点级速度场，但缺乏对跨部件交互的显式指导，导致收敛慢且精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何将预训练3D编码器中的关系结构知识注入流匹配主干，以引导部件运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 几何和接触中心的教师属性比语义分类能力更影响对齐效果，且对齐在空间结构自然出现的后期Transformer层最有益。
analysis.method: 提出TORA框架，通过token-wise余弦匹配和中心核对齐（CKA）损失，将冻结预训练3D编码器的表示对齐到流匹配网络。
contributions: 提出拓扑优先的表示对齐框架，无需推理开销即可提升流匹配性能。
系统探究了不同3D编码器属性对对齐效果的影响，发现几何/接触中心属性是关键。
在五个基准上实现SOTA，零样本迁移到未见数据集有显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准（涵盖几何、语义和跨对象组装）上评估，显示收敛速度提升高达6.9倍，分布内精度提升，域转移下鲁棒性增强。
limitations: 依赖预训练3D编码器的质量，可能受限于教师表示。
仅针对3D形状组装任务，泛化到其他任务需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过拓扑表示对齐提升3D形状组装的流匹配方法，实现更快收敛和更高精度。

papers.title: Geometric Limits of Knowledge Distillation: A Minimum-Width Theorem via Superposition Theory
papers.abstract: Knowledge distillation compresses large teachers into smaller students, but performance saturates at a loss floor that persists across training methods and objectives. We argue this floor is geometric: neural networks represent far more features than dimensions through superposition, and a student of width $d_S$ can encode at most $d_S \cdot g(α)$ features, where $g(α) = 1/((1-α)\ln\frac{1}{1-α})$ is a sparsity-dependent capacity function. Features beyond this budget are permanently lost, yielding an importance-weighted loss floor. We validate on a toy model (48 configurations, median accuracy >93%) and on Pythia-410M, where sparse autoencoders measure $F \approx 28{,}700$ features at $α\approx 0.992$ (critical width $d_S^* \approx 1{,}065$). Distillation into five student widths confirms the predicted monotonic floor ordering. The observed floor decomposes into a geometric component and a width-independent architectural baseline ($R^2 = 0.993$). Linear probing shows coarse concepts survive even 88% feature loss, revealing the floor arises from aggregate loss of fine-grained features in the importance distribution's long tail. Our results connect representation geometry to distillation limits and provide a practical tool for predicting distillation performance from SAE measurements alone.

analysis.tldr: 知识蒸馏存在由特征叠加几何容量决定的损失下限，学生网络宽度不足时细粒度特征永久丢失。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识蒸馏中性能饱和的损失下限普遍存在且无法通过训练方法消除，需要从表示几何角度理解其根本原因。
analysis.problem: 解释知识蒸馏中损失下限的几何起源，并量化学生网络宽度与可编码特征数量之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出损失下限源于神经网络通过叠加表示远超维度的特征，学生宽度d_S最多编码d_S·g(α)个特征，超出预算的特征永久丢失，形成重要性加权的损失下限。
analysis.method: 提出基于叠加理论的最小宽度定理，推导出容量函数g(α)=1/((1-α)ln(1/(1-α)))，并通过稀疏自编码器测量特征数量与稀疏度来预测临界宽度。
contributions: 建立了知识蒸馏损失下限与表示几何之间的理论联系，给出了学生网络宽度的容量界限。
提供了仅通过稀疏自编码器测量即可预测蒸馏性能的实用工具。
analysis.experiments: 在48种配置的玩具模型（中位准确率>93%）和Pythia-410M模型上验证，稀疏自编码器测得约28,700个特征，稀疏度α≈0.992，临界宽度约1,065。五种学生宽度的蒸馏实验确认了单调下限排序，损失下限分解为几何分量和宽度无关的架构基线（R²=0.993）。线性探测显示粗粒度概念在88%特征丢失后仍存活，下限源于重要性分布长尾中细粒度特征的聚合丢失。
limitations: 理论推导基于特定稀疏度假设，可能不适用于非稀疏特征表示。
实验仅在有限模型规模上验证，更大模型或不同架构的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 知识蒸馏存在由特征叠加几何容量决定的损失下限，学生网络宽度不足时细粒度特征永久丢失。

papers.title: Causality Laundering: Denial-Feedback Leakage in Tool-Calling LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Tool-calling LLM agents can read private data, invoke external services, and trigger real-world actions, creating a security problem at the point of tool execution. We identify a denial-feedback leakage pattern, which we term causality laundering, in which an adversary probes a protected action, learns from the denial outcome, and exfiltrates the inferred information through a later seemingly benign tool call. This attack is not captured by flat provenance tracking alone because the leaked information arises from causal influence of the denied action, not direct data flow. We present the Agentic Reference Monitor (ARM), a runtime enforcement layer that mediates every tool invocation by consulting a provenance graph over tool calls, returned data, field-level provenance, and denied actions. ARM propagates trust through an integrity lattice and augments the graph with counterfactual edges from denied-action nodes, enabling enforcement over both transitive data dependencies and denial-induced causal influence. In a controlled evaluation on three representative attack scenarios, ARM blocks causality laundering, transitive taint propagation, and mixed-provenance field misuse that a flat provenance baseline misses, while adding sub-millisecond policy evaluation overhead. These results suggest that denial-aware causal provenance is a useful abstraction for securing tool-calling agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果洗白攻击及基于因果溯源图的运行时防御机制ARM。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具调用LLM代理可访问私有数据并触发真实动作，但现有安全机制仅追踪直接数据流，无法防御通过拒绝反馈间接泄露信息的攻击。
analysis.problem: 解决工具调用LLM代理中拒绝反馈导致的因果信息泄露（因果洗白攻击）的检测与防御问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击者通过观察受保护动作的拒绝结果推断信息，并通过后续良性工具调用外泄，这种因果影响无法被扁平溯源捕获。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Reference Monitor (ARM)，运行时维护包含工具调用、返回数据、字段级溯源及拒绝动作的溯源图，通过完整性格传播信任，并添加反事实边以覆盖拒绝诱导的因果影响。
contributions: 识别并形式化工具调用LLM代理中的因果洗白攻击模式
提出ARM运行时监控机制，利用因果溯源图防御拒绝反馈泄露
analysis.experiments: 在三个代表性攻击场景中评估，ARM能阻断扁平溯源基线遗漏的因果洗白、传递性污染和混合溯源字段误用，且策略评估开销低于亚毫秒。
limitations: 评估场景有限，可能未覆盖所有攻击变体
反事实边的构建可能依赖对拒绝动作的准确识别
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果洗白攻击及基于因果溯源图的运行时防御机制ARM。

papers.title: ATSS: Detecting AI-Generated Videos via Anomalous Temporal Self-Similarity
papers.abstract: AI-generated videos (AIGVs) have achieved unprecedented photorealism, posing severe threats to digital forensics. Existing AIGV detectors focus mainly on localized artifacts or short-term temporal inconsistencies, thus often fail to capture the underlying generative logic governing global temporal evolution, limiting AIGV detection performance. In this paper, we identify a distinctive fingerprint in AIGVs, termed anomalous temporal self-similarity (ATSS). Unlike real videos that exhibit stochastic natural dynamics, AIGVs follow deterministic anchor-driven trajectories (e.g., text or image prompts), inducing unnaturally repetitive correlations across visual and semantic domains. To exploit this, we propose the ATSS method, a multimodal detection framework that exploits this insight via a triple-similarity representation and a cross-attentive fusion mechanism. Specifically, ATSS reconstructs semantic trajectories by leveraging frame-wise descriptions to construct visual, textual, and cross-modal similarity matrices, which jointly quantify the inherent temporal anomalies. These matrices are encoded by dedicated Transformer encoders and integrated via a bidirectional cross-attentive fusion module to effectively model intra- and inter-modal dynamics. Extensive experiments on four large-scale benchmarks, including GenVideo, EvalCrafter, VideoPhy, and VidProM, demonstrate that ATSS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of AP, AUC, and ACC metrics, exhibiting superior generalization across diverse video generation models. Code and models of ATSS will be released at https://github.com/hwang-cs-ime/ATSS.

analysis.tldr: 提出ATSS方法，利用异常时间自相似性检测AI生成视频，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成视频逼真度极高，对数字取证构成严重威胁，现有检测方法主要关注局部伪影或短期时间不一致，难以捕捉全局时间演化的生成逻辑。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测AI生成视频，特别是利用其全局时间演化中的异常模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成视频遵循确定性锚驱动轨迹（如文本或图像提示），导致视觉和语义域中出现不自然的重复相关性，而真实视频呈现随机自然动态。
analysis.method: 提出ATSS框架，通过帧级描述构建视觉、文本和跨模态相似性矩阵，量化时间异常，并使用专用Transformer编码器和双向交叉注意力融合模块建模模态内和模态间动态。
contributions: 识别出AI生成视频中的异常时间自相似性（ATSS）指纹。
提出基于三重相似性表示和交叉注意力融合的多模态检测框架。
在四个大规模基准上显著优于现有方法，展现良好的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在GenVideo、EvalCrafter、VideoPhy和VidProM四个基准上评估，ATSS在AP、AUC和ACC指标上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对高度动态或长视频的计算开销较大。
依赖帧级描述的质量，可能受限于描述模型的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ATSS方法，利用异常时间自相似性检测AI生成视频，在多个基准上超越现有方法。

papers.title: 1.x-Distill: Breaking the Diversity, Quality, and Efficiency Barrier in Distribution Matching Distillation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models produce high-quality text-to-image results, but their iterative denoising is computationally expensive.Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) emerges as a promising path to few-step distillation, but suffers from diversity collapse and fidelity degradation when reduced to two steps or fewer. We present 1.x-Distill, the first fractional-step distillation framework that breaks the integer-step constraint of prior few-step methods and establishes 1.x-step generation as a practical regime for distilled diffusion models.Specifically, we first analyze the overlooked role of teacher CFG in DMD and introduce a simple yet effective modification to suppress mode collapse. Then, to improve performance under extreme steps, we introduce Stagewise Focused Distillation, a two-stage strategy that learns coarse structure through diversity-preserving distribution matching and refines details with inference-consistent adversarial distillation. Furthermore, we design a lightweight compensation module for Distill--Cache co-Training, which naturally incorporates block-level caching into our distillation pipeline.Experiments on SD3-Medium and SD3.5-Large show that 1.x-Distill surpasses prior few-step methods, achieving better quality and diversity at 1.67 and 1.74 effective NFEs, respectively, with up to 33x speedup over original 28x2 NFE sampling.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个分数步蒸馏框架1.x-Distill，突破整数步限制，在1.67-1.74步实现高质量多样化的文本到图像生成，速度提升33倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型迭代去噪计算成本高，分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）虽能实现少步蒸馏，但在两步或更少步时会出现多样性崩溃和质量下降，亟需突破整数步限制并解决极端少步下的性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何打破现有少步蒸馏方法的整数步约束，在1.x步（如1.67步）下同时保持生成质量、多样性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出DMD中教师CFG的作用被忽视，且现有方法在两步或更少步时遭遇多样性崩溃和保真度下降。
analysis.method: 1.x-Distill框架包含三项创新：1) 修正教师CFG以抑制模式崩溃；2) 两阶段策略Stagewise Focused Distillation，先通过分布匹配保留多样性，再用对抗蒸馏细化细节；3) 轻量补偿模块实现Distill--Cache协同训练，将块级缓存融入蒸馏流程。
contributions: 提出首个分数步蒸馏框架1.x-Distill，突破整数步限制，实现1.x步生成。
揭示并修正教师CFG在DMD中的关键作用，抑制模式崩溃。
设计两阶段蒸馏策略和缓存协同训练模块，在极端少步下兼顾质量与多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3-Medium和SD3.5-Large上实验，1.x-Distill在1.67和1.74有效NFE下超越先前少步方法，质量与多样性更优，速度相比原始28×2 NFE采样提升33倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（SD3-Medium/3.5-Large），泛化性需验证。
分数步生成的实际部署兼容性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个分数步蒸馏框架1.x-Distill，突破整数步限制，在1.67-1.74步实现高质量多样化的文本到图像生成，速度提升33倍。

papers.title: HOIGS: Human-Object Interaction Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic scenes with complex human-object interactions is a fundamental challenge in computer vision and graphics. Existing Gaussian Splatting methods either rely on human pose priors while neglecting dynamic objects, or approximate all motions within a single field, limiting their ability to capture interaction-rich dynamics. To address this gap, we propose Human-Object Interaction Gaussian Splatting (HOIGS), which explicitly models interaction-induced deformation between humans and objects through a cross-attention-based HOI module. Distinct deformation baselines are employed to extract features: HexPlane for humans and Cubic Hermite Spline (CHS) for objects. By integrating these heterogeneous features, HOIGS effectively captures interdependent motions and improves deformation estimation in scenarios involving occlusion, contact, and object manipulation. Comprehensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art human-centric and 4D Gaussian approaches, highlighting the importance of explicitly modeling human-object interactions for high-fidelity reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出HOIGS，通过交叉注意力模块显式建模人-物交互变形，实现高保真动态场景重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有高斯泼溅方法要么依赖人体姿态先验而忽略动态物体，要么将所有运动近似在单一场中，难以捕捉交互丰富的动态场景。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模人-物交互引起的变形，以提升动态场景重建的保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HOIGS，包含基于交叉注意力的HOI模块，分别使用HexPlane和三次埃尔米特样条（CHS）提取人体和物体的变形特征，并融合这些异构特征以捕捉相互依赖的运动。
contributions: 首次在3D高斯泼溅中显式建模人-物交互变形。
提出交叉注意力HOI模块和异构变形基线融合策略。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，HOIGS一致优于最先进的人体中心和4D高斯方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人体姿态先验。
对极端遮挡或复杂交互场景的泛化能力有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HOIGS，通过交叉注意力模块显式建模人-物交互变形，实现高保真动态场景重建。

papers.title: OASIC: Occlusion-Agnostic and Severity-Informed Classification
papers.abstract: Severe occlusions of objects pose a major challenge for computer vision. We show that two root causes are (1) the loss of visible information and (2) the distracting patterns caused by the occluders. Our approach addresses both causes at the same time. First, the distracting patterns are removed at test-time, via masking of the occluding patterns. This masking is independent of the type of occlusion, by handling the occlusion through the lens of visual anomalies w.r.t. the object of interest. Second, to deal with less visual details, we follow standard practice by masking random parts of the object during training, for various degrees of occlusions. We discover that (a) it is possible to estimate the degree of the occlusion (i.e. severity) at test-time, and (b) that a model optimized for a specific degree of occlusion also performs best on a similar degree during test-time. Combining these two insights brings us to a severity-informed classification model called OASIC: Occlusion Agnostic Severity Informed Classification. We estimate the severity of occlusion for a test image, mask the occluder, and select the model that is optimized for the degree of occlusion. This strategy performs better than any single model optimized for any smaller or broader range of occlusion severities. Experiments show that combining gray masking with adaptive model selection improves $\text{AUC}_\text{occ}$ by +18.5 over standard training on occluded images and +23.7 over finetuning on unoccluded images.

analysis.tldr: 提出OASIC方法，通过测试时遮挡物掩码和基于遮挡严重度的模型选择，显著提升遮挡图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 严重遮挡是计算机视觉的主要挑战，现有方法难以同时处理信息丢失和遮挡物干扰。
analysis.problem: 解决物体严重遮挡下的图像分类问题，需同时应对可见信息减少和遮挡物引入的干扰模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现测试时可估计遮挡严重度，且针对特定严重度优化的模型在相似严重度下表现最佳。
analysis.method: 测试时通过异常检测掩码去除遮挡物，训练时随机掩码物体部分以模拟不同遮挡程度，测试时估计遮挡严重度并选择对应优化模型。
contributions: 提出遮挡无关的测试时掩码方法，通过异常视角处理任意类型遮挡。
发现遮挡严重度可估计且模型对特定严重度最优，据此提出严重度感知的模型选择策略。
analysis.experiments: 在遮挡图像上AUC_occ比标准训练提升18.5，比在无遮挡图像上微调提升23.7。
limitations: 可能依赖遮挡严重度估计的准确性。
需要为每个严重度训练独立模型，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OASIC方法，通过测试时遮挡物掩码和基于遮挡严重度的模型选择，显著提升遮挡图像分类性能。

papers.title: Architecture Without Architects: How AI Coding Agents Shape Software Architecture
papers.abstract: AI coding agents select frameworks, scaffold infrastructure, and wire integrations, often in seconds. These are architectural decisions, yet almost no one reviews them as such. We identify five mechanisms by which agents make implicit architectural choices and propose six prompt-architecture coupling patterns that map natural-language prompt features to the infrastructure they require. The patterns range from contingent couplings (structured output validation) that may weaken as models improve to fundamental ones (tool-call orchestration) that persist regardless of model capability. An illustrative demonstration confirms that prompt wording alone produces structurally different systems for the same task. We term the phenomenon vibe architecting, architecture shaped by prompts rather than deliberate design, and outline review practices, decision records, and tooling to bring these hidden decisions under governance.

analysis.tldr: AI编码代理通过提示词隐式决定软件架构，本文提出“氛围架构”概念并总结六种提示-架构耦合模式。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码代理在秒级内做出框架选择、基础设施搭建等架构决策，但这些决策几乎未被审查，导致架构质量失控。
analysis.problem: AI编码代理通过自然语言提示隐式做出架构决策，缺乏显式审查和治理机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出提示词措辞本身即可为同一任务产生结构不同的系统，并识别了五种隐式架构选择机制。
analysis.method: 识别五种隐式架构选择机制，提出六种提示-架构耦合模式（从偶然耦合到基础耦合），并建议审查实践、决策记录和工具。
contributions: 识别AI编码代理隐式架构选择的五种机制
提出六种提示-架构耦合模式，区分偶然与基础耦合
定义“氛围架构”现象并建议治理实践
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及一个说明性演示。
limitations: 缺乏大规模实证验证
治理实践的具体效果未评估
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI编码代理通过提示词隐式决定软件架构，本文提出“氛围架构”概念并总结六种提示-架构耦合模式。

papers.title: A Systematic Study of Cross-Modal Typographic Attacks on Audio-Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: As audio-visual multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, understanding their vulnerabilities is crucial. To this end, we introduce Multi-Modal Typography, a systematic study examining how typographic attacks across multiple modalities adversely influence MLLMs. While prior work focuses narrowly on unimodal attacks, we expose the cross-modal fragility of MLLMs. We analyze the interactions between audio, visual, and text perturbations and reveal that coordinated multi-modal attack creates a significantly more potent threat than single-modality attacks (attack success rate = $83.43\%$ vs $34.93\%$).Our findings across multiple frontier MLLMs, tasks, and common-sense reasoning and content moderation benchmarks establishes multi-modal typography as a critical and underexplored attack strategy in multi-modal reasoning. Code and data will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 跨模态排版攻击显著威胁多模态大模型，多模态联合攻击成功率远高于单模态。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在安全关键场景中部署，但现有攻击研究仅关注单模态，缺乏对跨模态脆弱性的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 研究跨模态排版攻击如何影响音频-视觉多模态大模型的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态联合攻击比单模态攻击更有效（成功率83.43% vs 34.93%），表明跨模态交互放大了脆弱性。
analysis.method: 提出Multi-Modal Typography攻击框架，在音频、视觉和文本模态上协同施加排版扰动。
contributions: 首次系统研究跨模态排版攻击对音频-视觉多模态大模型的影响。
揭示多模态联合攻击的显著威胁，并建立相关基准。
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿多模态大模型、任务及常识推理和内容审核基准上评估，攻击成功率83.43%。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有多模态模型架构。
攻击的迁移性和防御策略未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨模态排版攻击显著威胁多模态大模型，多模态联合攻击成功率远高于单模态。

papers.title: Can LLMs Learn to Reason Robustly under Noisy Supervision?
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) effectively trains reasoning models that rely on abundant perfect labels, but its vulnerability to unavoidable noisy labels due to expert scarcity remains critically underexplored. In this work, we take the first step toward a systematic analysis of noisy label mechanisms in RLVR. In contrast to supervised classification, most RLVR algorithms incorporate a rollout-based condition: a label's influence on training is contingent on whether the current policy can generate rollouts that realize it, a property that naturally extends to noisy labels. Based on this observation, we distinguish two types of noise: inactive noisy labels, which reduce data efficiency, and active noisy labels, which are reinforced and risk skewing the model toward incorrect distributions. From experiments on training with noisy samples, we identify an Early Correctness Coherence phenomenon: although noisy samples begin to lag behind in later stages, accuracy on both clean and noisy samples increases similarly in early training. Motivated by this dynamic, we propose Online Label Refinement (OLR), which progressively corrects potentially noisy labels with majority-voted answers when two conditions hold: a positive slope in the majority answer's rollout pass rate and stable historical consistency across updates, enabling gradual self-correction as the policy improves. We evaluate OLR on six in-distribution mathematical reasoning benchmarks (AIME24/25, AMC, MATH-500, Minerva, and Olympiad) and three out-of-distribution tasks (ARC-c, GPQA-diamond, and MMLU-pro). Across noise ratios from 0.1 to 0.9, OLR consistently improves robustness under both inactive and active noisy-label settings, achieving average gains of 3.6% to 3.9% on in-distribution benchmarks and 3.3% to 4.6% on out-of-distribution evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线标签精炼方法，提升RLVR在噪声标签下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR依赖大量完美标签，但专家稀缺导致噪声标签不可避免，其影响机制尚不明确。
analysis.problem: RLVR训练中噪声标签的鲁棒性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 区分了非活跃噪声标签（降低数据效率）和活跃噪声标签（导致模型偏向错误分布），并观察到早期正确性一致性现象。
analysis.method: 提出在线标签精炼（OLR），在满足多数答案的rollout通过率正斜率且历史一致性稳定时，用多数投票答案逐步修正潜在噪声标签。
contributions: 首次系统分析RLVR中噪声标签机制，区分非活跃与活跃噪声。
提出OLR方法，在多种噪声比例下提升鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在6个数学推理基准和3个分布外任务上评估，噪声比例0.1-0.9，OLR在分布内基准上平均提升3.6%-3.9%，分布外评估提升3.3%-4.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖多数投票的准确性。
未讨论其他类型噪声或更复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线标签精炼方法，提升RLVR在噪声标签下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: The Art of Building Verifiers for Computer Use Agents
papers.abstract: Verifying the success of computer use agent (CUA) trajectories is a critical challenge: without reliable verification, neither evaluation nor training signal can be trusted. In this paper, we present lessons learned from building a best-in-class verifier for web tasks we call the Universal Verifier. We design the Universal Verifier around four key principles: 1) constructing rubrics with meaningful, non-overlapping criteria to reduce noise; 2) separating process and outcome rewards that yield complementary signals, capturing cases where an agent follows the right steps but gets blocked or succeeds through an unexpected path; 3) distinguishing between controllable and uncontrollable failures scored via a cascading-error-free strategy for finer-grained failure understanding; and 4) a divide-and-conquer context management scheme that attends to all screenshots in a trajectory, improving reliability on longer task horizons. We validate these findings on CUAVerifierBench, a new set of CUA trajectories with both process and outcome human labels, showing that our Universal Verifier agrees with humans as often as humans agree with each other. We report a reduction in false positive rates to near zero compared to baselines like WebVoyager ($\geq$ 45\%) and WebJudge ($\geq$ 22\%). We emphasize that these gains stem from the cumulative effect of the design choices above. We also find that an auto-research agent achieves 70\% of expert quality in 5\% of the time, but fails to discover all strategies required to replicate the Universal Verifier. We open-source our Universal Verifier system along with CUAVerifierBench; available at https://github.com/microsoft/fara.

analysis.tldr: 提出构建计算机使用智能体验证器的四大原则，实现接近人类一致性的验证性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机使用智能体（CUA）轨迹的验证是评估和训练信号可靠性的关键挑战，现有验证器存在高误报率等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建高可靠性的CUA轨迹验证器，使其与人类判断高度一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Universal Verifier，基于四大原则：1) 构建有意义、不重叠的评分标准；2) 分离过程奖励和结果奖励；3) 区分可控与不可控失败，采用级联错误避免策略；4) 分治上下文管理方案处理长轨迹。
contributions: 提出构建CUA验证器的四大设计原则，并实现Universal Verifier。
发布CUAVerifierBench数据集，包含过程与结果人工标注。
开源Universal Verifier系统及数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在CUAVerifierBench上验证，Universal Verifier与人类一致性达到人类间一致性水平，误报率相比WebVoyager降低≥45%，相比WebJudge降低≥22%。
limitations: 自动研究智能体仅达到专家质量的70%，未能发现所有策略。
验证器可能依赖特定任务设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出构建计算机使用智能体验证器的四大原则，实现接近人类一致性的验证性能。

papers.title: Prune-Quantize-Distill: An Ordered Pipeline for Efficient Neural Network Compression
papers.abstract: Modern deployment often requires trading accuracy for efficiency under tight CPU and memory constraints, yet common compression proxies such as parameter count or FLOPs do not reliably predict wall-clock inference time. In particular, unstructured sparsity can reduce model storage while failing to accelerate (and sometimes slightly slowing down) standard CPU execution due to irregular memory access and sparse kernel overhead. Motivated by this gap between compression and acceleration, we study a practical, ordered pipeline that targets measured latency by combining three widely used techniques: unstructured pruning, INT8 quantization-aware training (QAT), and knowledge distillation (KD). Empirically, INT8 QAT provides the dominant runtime benefit, while pruning mainly acts as a capacity-reduction pre-conditioner that improves the robustness of subsequent low-precision optimization; KD, applied last, recovers accuracy within the already constrained sparse INT8 regime without changing the deployment form. We evaluate on CIFAR-10/100 using three backbones (ResNet-18, WRN-28-10, and VGG-16-BN). Across all settings, the ordered pipeline achieves a stronger accuracy-size-latency frontier than any single technique alone, reaching 0.99-1.42 ms CPU latency with competitive accuracy and compact checkpoints. Controlled ordering ablations with a fixed 20/40/40 epoch allocation further confirm that stage order is consequential, with the proposed ordering generally performing best among the tested permutations. Overall, our results provide a simple guideline for edge deployment: evaluate compression choices in the joint accuracy-size-latency space using measured runtime, rather than proxy metrics alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出剪枝-量化-蒸馏有序流水线，在CPU上实现比单一技术更优的精度-大小-延迟权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有压缩代理指标（如参数量、FLOPs）无法可靠预测实际CPU推理延迟，非结构化剪枝甚至可能因不规则内存访问而减慢执行速度，亟需一种以实测延迟为目标的实用压缩流水线。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个有序的压缩流水线，在CPU部署中同时优化模型精度、存储大小和实际推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: INT8量化感知训练提供主要运行时收益；剪枝主要作为容量缩减预处理器，提高后续低精度优化的鲁棒性；蒸馏在已约束的稀疏INT8域中恢复精度而不改变部署形式。
analysis.method: 提出剪枝→INT8量化感知训练→知识蒸馏的有序流水线，其中剪枝降低容量，量化加速推理，蒸馏恢复精度。
contributions: 提出并验证了剪枝-量化-蒸馏有序流水线在CPU延迟、精度和模型大小上的联合优势。
通过消融实验证明阶段顺序的重要性，并给出边缘部署的实用指导：使用实测运行时而非代理指标评估压缩选择。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10/100上使用ResNet-18、WRN-28-10和VGG-16-BN三个骨干网络进行评估，达到0.99-1.42 ms CPU延迟，并进行了顺序消融实验。
limitations: 仅在CIFAR-10/100小规模数据集上验证，未在ImageNet等更大规模数据集上测试。
仅针对CPU部署，未考虑GPU或其他硬件平台。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出剪枝-量化-蒸馏有序流水线，在CPU上实现比单一技术更优的精度-大小-延迟权衡。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Mural Restoration via a Unified Hybrid Mask-Aware Transformer
papers.abstract: Ancient murals are valuable cultural artifacts, but many have suffered severe degradation due to environmental exposure, material aging, and human activity. Restoring these artworks is challenging because it requires both reconstructing large missing structures and strictly preserving authentic, undamaged regions. This paper presents the Hybrid Mask-Aware Transformer (HMAT), a unified framework for high-fidelity mural restoration. HMAT integrates Mask-Aware Dynamic Filtering for robust local texture modeling with a Transformer bottleneck for long-range structural inference. To further address the diverse morphology of degradation, we introduce a mask-conditional style fusion module that dynamically guides the generative process. In addition, a Teacher-Forcing Decoder with hard-gated skip connections is designed to enforce fidelity in valid regions and focus reconstruction on missing areas. We evaluate HMAT on the DHMural dataset and a curated Nine-Colored Deer dataset under varying degradation levels. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches, while producing more structurally coherent and visually faithful restorations. These findings suggest that HMAT provides an effective solution for the digital restoration of cultural heritage murals.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合掩码感知Transformer（HMAT）用于高保真壁画修复，结合局部纹理建模和长程结构推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 古代壁画因环境暴露、材料老化和人为活动严重退化，修复需要同时重建大尺度缺失结构并严格保留未损坏区域，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何在壁画修复中同时实现大尺度缺失结构的准确重建和未损坏区域的严格保真。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合掩码感知Transformer（HMAT），集成掩码感知动态滤波进行局部纹理建模、Transformer瓶颈进行长程结构推理、掩码条件风格融合模块动态引导生成过程，以及带硬门控跳跃连接的教师强制解码器以强制保真。
contributions: 提出HMAT统一框架，融合局部纹理和全局结构推理。
设计掩码条件风格融合模块和教师强制解码器，提升修复保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在DHMural数据集和自建的九色鹿数据集上评估，与SOTA方法对比，HMAT在结构连贯性和视觉保真度上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量掩码标注。
在极端退化情况下性能可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合掩码感知Transformer（HMAT）用于高保真壁画修复，结合局部纹理建模和长程结构推理。

papers.title: Gram-Anchored Prompt Learning for Vision-Language Models via Second-Order Statistics
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient prompt learning has become the de facto standard for adapting Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to downstream tasks. Existing approaches predominantly focus on aligning text prompts with first-order visual features (i.e., spatial feature maps). While effective for fine-grained semantic discrimination, we argue that relying solely on first-order information is insufficient for robust adaptation, as these spatially entangled features are highly susceptible to domain shifts and local noise. In this work, we propose \textbf{Gram-Anchored Prompt Learning (GAPL)} for Vision-Language Models via Second-Order Statistics, a framework that synergizes local semantic alignment with global structural consistency. Methodologically, we introduce an additional second-order statistical stream via \textbf{Gram matrices} that augments the standard first-order spatial interaction. By anchoring prompts to these second-order priors, our approach enables language representations to dynamically adapt to statistical distribution shifts across diverse domains. Extensive experiments indicate the effectiveness of the second-order features, and show compelling performances of GAPL on various benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Gram-Anchored Prompt Learning (GAPL)，利用二阶统计量（Gram矩阵）增强视觉-语言模型提示学习的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示学习方法仅依赖一阶视觉特征（空间特征图），易受域偏移和局部噪声影响，缺乏鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用二阶统计信息增强提示学习，使语言表示适应不同域的统计分布偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一阶特征在域偏移下性能下降，二阶统计量（Gram矩阵）能捕捉全局结构一致性，提升鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 在标准一阶空间交互基础上，引入Gram矩阵作为二阶统计流，将提示锚定到二阶先验上，实现动态适应。
contributions: 提出GAPL框架，融合一阶语义对齐与二阶全局结构一致性。
通过Gram矩阵引入二阶统计信息，增强提示学习对域偏移的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 二阶统计计算可能增加额外开销。
未在极端域偏移场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Gram-Anchored Prompt Learning (GAPL)，利用二阶统计量（Gram矩阵）增强视觉-语言模型提示学习的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Quantifying Trust: Financial Risk Management for Trustworthy AI Agents
papers.abstract: Prior work on trustworthy AI emphasizes model-internal properties such as bias mitigation, adversarial robustness, and interpretability. As AI systems evolve into autonomous agents deployed in open environments and increasingly connected to payments or assets, the operational meaning of trust shifts to end-to-end outcomes: whether an agent completes tasks, follows user intent, and avoids failures that cause material or psychological harm. These risks are fundamentally product-level and cannot be eliminated by technical safeguards alone because agent behavior is inherently stochastic. To address this gap between model-level reliability and user-facing assurance, we propose a complementary framework based on risk management. Drawing inspiration from financial underwriting, we introduce the \textbf{Agentic Risk Standard (ARS)}, a payment settlement standard for AI-mediated transactions. ARS integrates risk assessment, underwriting, and compensation into a single transaction framework that protects users when interacting with agents. Under ARS, users receive predefined and contractually enforceable compensation in cases of execution failure, misalignment, or unintended outcomes. This shifts trust from an implicit expectation about model behavior to an explicit, measurable, and enforceable product guarantee. We also present a simulation study analyzing the social benefits of applying ARS to agentic transactions. ARS's implementation can be found at https://github.com/t54-labs/AgenticRiskStandard.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agentic Risk Standard (ARS)，将金融风险管理框架引入AI Agent信任评估，通过可执行的补偿机制将信任从模型内部属性转化为产品级保障。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可信AI研究聚焦模型内部属性（如偏见缓解、对抗鲁棒性），但自主Agent在开放环境中部署时，信任的运营意义转向端到端结果（任务完成、用户意图遵循、避免危害），这些风险本质上是产品级的，无法仅靠技术保障消除。
analysis.problem: 缺乏将AI Agent的随机行为风险转化为用户可感知、可执行保障的框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Agent行为具有固有随机性，模型级可靠性无法覆盖用户面临的实际风险，现有技术手段无法完全消除产品级风险。
analysis.method: 借鉴金融核保思想，提出Agentic Risk Standard (ARS)，集成风险评估、核保和补偿机制，为AI中介交易提供支付结算标准，用户在执行失败、未对齐或意外结果时获得预定义且可合同执行的补偿。
contributions: 提出Agentic Risk Standard (ARS)框架，将金融风险管理应用于AI Agent信任评估
设计包含风险评估、核保和补偿的统一交易框架，将信任转化为可测量、可执行的产品保证
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及一项模拟研究分析ARS应用于Agent交易的社会效益。
limitations: 框架依赖合同执行和法律环境，实际部署可能面临监管挑战
补偿机制可能引发道德风险，用户可能过度依赖补偿而忽视风险
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agentic Risk Standard (ARS)，将金融风险管理框架引入AI Agent信任评估，通过可执行的补偿机制将信任从模型内部属性转化为产品级保障。

papers.title: Hierarchical Point-Patch Fusion with Adaptive Patch Codebook for 3D Shape Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: 3D shape anomaly detection is a crucial task for industrial inspection and geometric analysis. Existing deep learning approaches typically learn representations of normal shapes and identify anomalies via out-of-distribution feature detection or decoder-based reconstruction. They often fail to generalize across diverse anomaly types and scales, such as global geometric errors (e.g., planar shifts, angle misalignments), and are sensitive to noisy or incomplete local points during training. To address these limitations, we propose a hierarchical point-patch anomaly scoring network that jointly models regional part features and local point features for robust anomaly reasoning. An adaptive patchification module integrates self-supervised decomposition to capture complex structural deviations. Beyond evaluations on public benchmarks (Anomaly-ShapeNet and Real3D-AD), we release an industrial test set with real CAD models exhibiting planar, angular, and structural defects. Experiments on public and industrial datasets show superior AUC-ROC and AUC-PR performance, including over 40% point-level improvement on the new industrial anomaly type and average object-level gains of 7% on Real3D-AD and 4% on Anomaly-ShapeNet, demonstrating strong robustness and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层点-块融合网络，结合自适应块码本，在3D形状异常检测中实现跨尺度、跨类型的鲁棒检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D异常检测方法难以泛化到多种异常类型和尺度（如全局几何误差），且对训练中的噪声或不完整局部点敏感，工业检测需求迫切。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模区域级和局部点特征，实现对全局几何异常（如平面偏移、角度偏差）和局部点异常的鲁棒检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在全局几何误差（如平面偏移、角度偏差）上表现不佳，且对噪声和不完整点云敏感。
analysis.method: 提出分层点-块异常评分网络，包含自适应块化模块（自监督分解）和点-块融合机制，联合建模区域块特征和局部点特征。
contributions: 提出分层点-块融合网络，联合建模区域和局部特征，提升跨尺度异常检测能力。
设计自适应块化模块，通过自监督分解捕获复杂结构偏差。
发布包含真实CAD模型的工业测试集，涵盖平面、角度和结构缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 在Anomaly-ShapeNet、Real3D-AD和自建工业数据集上评估，AUC-ROC和AUC-PR指标提升显著，包括新工业异常类型上点级提升超40%，对象级平均提升7%（Real3D-AD）和4%（Anomaly-ShapeNet）。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量点云输入，对极端噪声场景的鲁棒性未充分验证。
自适应块化模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层点-块融合网络，结合自适应块码本，在3D形状异常检测中实现跨尺度、跨类型的鲁棒检测。

papers.title: A Modular Zero-Shot Pipeline for Accident Detection, Localization, and Classification in Traffic Surveillance Video
papers.abstract: We describe a zero-shot pipeline developed for the ACCIDENT @ CVPR 2026 challenge. The challenge requires predicting when, where, and what type of traffic accident occurs in surveillance video, without labeled real-world training data. Our method separates the problem into three independent modules. The first module localizes the collision in time by running peak detection on z-score normalized frame-difference signals. The second module finds the impact location by computing the weighted centroid of cumulative dense optical flow magnitude maps using the Farneback algorithm. The third module classifies collision type by measuring cosine similarity between CLIP image embeddings of frames near the detected peak and text embeddings built from multi-prompt natural language descriptions of each collision category. No domain-specific fine-tuning is involved; the pipeline processes each video using only pre-trained model weights. Our implementation is publicly available as a Kaggle notebook.

analysis.tldr: 提出零样本模块化流水线，通过帧差峰值检测、光流质心定位和CLIP文本-图像相似度实现交通事故检测、定位与分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 交通监控视频中的事故检测通常依赖大量标注数据，但在真实场景中获取标注成本高、泛化性差，亟需无需领域微调的零样本方法。
analysis.problem: 在无标注真实训练数据条件下，同时预测监控视频中交通事故的发生时间、空间位置和碰撞类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将任务分解为三个独立模块：1) 时间定位：对z-score归一化的帧差信号进行峰值检测；2) 空间定位：使用Farneback算法计算累积稠密光流幅值的加权质心；3) 类型分类：计算碰撞附近帧的CLIP图像嵌入与多提示文本嵌入的余弦相似度。全程使用预训练模型，无领域微调。
contributions: 提出首个零样本交通事故检测、定位与分类模块化流水线
公开Kaggle notebook实现，便于复现和扩展
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型在通用域的特征，可能对罕见事故类型或复杂场景失效
光流质心定位在遮挡或密集交通场景下精度有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零样本模块化流水线，通过帧差峰值检测、光流质心定位和CLIP文本-图像相似度实现交通事故检测、定位与分类。

papers.title: TraceGuard: Structured Multi-Dimensional Monitoring as a Collusion-Resistant Control Protocol
papers.abstract: AI control protocols use monitors to detect attacks by untrusted AI agents, but standard single-score monitors face two limitations: they miss subtle attacks where outputs look clean but reasoning is off, and they collapse to near-zero safety when the monitor is the same model as the agent (collusion). We present TraceGuard, a structured multi-dimensional monitoring protocol that evaluates agent actions across five dimensions -- goal alignment, constraint adherence, reasoning coherence, safety awareness, and action-trace consistency -- scored in parallel by independent LLM calls, augmented by seven heuristic detectors and an LLM-based intent analyzer. We evaluate on BashArena (637 bash tasks, 4 attack categories) within the ControlArena framework. Our results on 519 samples (279 honest, 240 attack) show that: (1) the hybrid approach achieves clear attack-honest separation (attack mean 0.616 vs. honest mean 0.206, Delta=0.410); (2) structured scoring constrains collusion -- the untrusted structured monitor achieves 95% safety vs. 0% for single-score untrusted monitoring; (3) goal alignment and constraint adherence are the most discriminative dimensions; and (4) a separation-of-duties variant splitting dimensions across trusted and untrusted models achieves 100% safety while preventing any single model from seeing the full evaluation. TraceGuard is implemented as a new monitor type for the open-source ControlArena framework.

analysis.tldr: TraceGuard 提出结构化多维度监控协议，通过独立评估五个维度并融合启发式检测器，有效抵御 AI 代理攻击并防止监控模型与代理共谋。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 控制协议使用单分数监控器，难以检测推理异常且易因监控模型与代理相同而共谋失效，亟需更鲁棒的监控方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种监控协议，既能检测隐蔽攻击（输出正常但推理异常），又能抵抗监控模型与代理之间的共谋行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单分数监控器在共谋场景下安全率降至近零，而结构化多维度评分可显著提升安全性（95% vs 0%）。
analysis.method: TraceGuard 协议：通过独立 LLM 调用并行评估五个维度（目标对齐、约束遵守、推理连贯性、安全意识、行为轨迹一致性），并融合七个启发式检测器和一个基于 LLM 的意图分析器。
contributions: 提出结构化多维度监控协议，显著提升攻击检测能力（攻击与诚实样本分离 Delta=0.410）。
证明结构化评分可有效约束共谋，非可信监控器安全率达 95%（单分数为 0%）。
识别目标对齐和约束遵守为最具区分力的维度，并设计职责分离变体实现 100% 安全。
analysis.experiments: 在 ControlArena 框架的 BashArena 上评估，包含 637 个 bash 任务和 4 种攻击类别，共 519 个样本（279 诚实，240 攻击）。
limitations: 依赖多个 LLM 调用，可能增加计算开销。
启发式检测器需针对特定场景设计，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TraceGuard 提出结构化多维度监控协议，通过独立评估五个维度并融合启发式检测器，有效抵御 AI 代理攻击并防止监控模型与代理共谋。

papers.title: SKILLFOUNDRY: Building Self-Evolving Agent Skill Libraries from Heterogeneous Scientific Resources
papers.abstract: Modern scientific ecosystems are rich in procedural knowledge across repositories, APIs, scripts, notebooks, documentation, databases, and papers, yet much of this knowledge remains fragmented across heterogeneous artifacts that agents cannot readily operationalize. This gap between abundant scientific know-how and usable agent capabilities is a key bottleneck for building effective scientific agents. We present SkillFoundry, a self-evolving framework that converts such resources into validated agent skills, reusable packages that encode task scope, inputs and outputs, execution steps, environment assumptions, provenance, and tests. SkillFoundry organizes a target domain as a domain knowledge tree, mines resources from high-value branches, extracts operational contracts, compiles them into executable skill packages, and then iteratively expands, repairs, merges, or prunes the resulting library through a closed-loop validation process. SkillFoundry produces a substantially novel and internally valid skill library, with 71.1\% of mined skills differing from existing skill libraries such as SkillHub and SkillSMP. We demonstrate that these mined skills improve coding agent performance on five of the six MoSciBench datasets. We further show that SkillFoundry can design new task-specific skills on demand for concrete scientific objectives, and that the resulting skills substantially improve performance on two challenging genomics tasks: cell type annotation and the scDRS workflow. Together, these results show that automatically mined skills improve agent performance on benchmarks and domain-specific tasks, expand coverage beyond hand-crafted skill libraries, and provide a practical foundation for more capable scientific agents.

analysis.tldr: SkillFoundry 从异构科学资源中自动挖掘并构建自进化的智能体技能库，提升科学智能体在基准和领域任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代科学生态系统中的程序性知识分散在仓库、API、脚本、文档等多种异构资源中，难以被智能体直接利用，成为构建高效科学智能体的关键瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何从异构科学资源中自动提取、验证并组织可复用的智能体技能，以构建覆盖广泛、持续进化的技能库。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SkillFoundry 框架：构建领域知识树，从高价值分支挖掘资源，提取操作契约并编译为可执行技能包，通过闭环验证过程迭代扩展、修复、合并或剪枝技能库。
contributions: 提出 SkillFoundry，一个从异构科学资源自动构建自进化技能库的框架。
实验证明自动挖掘的技能在 MoSciBench 六个数据集中的五个上提升了编码智能体性能，并在两个基因组学任务上显著改善表现。
analysis.experiments: 在 MoSciBench 六个数据集上评估编码智能体性能，其中五个数据集有提升；在细胞类型注释和 scDRS 工作流两个基因组学任务上验证了按需设计技能的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖领域知识树的初始构建质量。
技能库的泛化性可能受限于挖掘资源的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillFoundry 从异构科学资源中自动挖掘并构建自进化的智能体技能库，提升科学智能体在基准和领域任务上的表现。

papers.title: VLA-Forget: Vision-Language-Action Unlearning for Embodied Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are emerging as embodied foundation models for robotic manipulation, but their deployment introduces a new unlearning challenge: removing unsafe, spurious, or privacy-sensitive behaviors without degrading perception, language grounding, and action control. In OpenVLA-style policies, behavior is produced through a fused visual encoder, a cross-modal projector, and a language backbone that predicts tokenized robot actions, so undesirable knowledge can be distributed across perception, alignment, and reasoning/action layers rather than confined to a single module. Consequently, partial unlearning applied only to the vision stack or only to the language backbone is often insufficient, while conventional unlearning baselines designed for standalone vision or language models may leave residual forgetting or incur unnecessary utility loss in embodied settings. We propose VLA-Forget, a hybrid unlearning framework that combines ratio-aware selective editing for perception and cross-modal specificity with layer-selective reasoning/action unlearning for utility-preserving forgetting. VLA-Forget jointly optimizes three objectives: targeted forgetting, perceptual preservation, and reasoning retention, through staged updates over the visual encoder, projector, and upper action-generating transformer blocks. Across forget-set behavior probes and retain-task evaluations, VLA-Forget improves forgetting efficacy by 10%, preserves perceptual specificity by 22%, retains reasoning and task success by 9%, and reduces post-quantization recovery by 55% relative to strong unlearning baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLA-Forget框架，针对VLA模型实现安全遗忘，在遗忘效果、感知保留和推理保持上均优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型作为具身基础模型部署时，需要移除不安全、虚假或隐私敏感的行为，但现有遗忘方法仅针对单一模态，无法处理VLA中跨感知、对齐和推理层的分布式知识，导致遗忘不彻底或效用损失。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏感知、语言理解和动作控制的前提下，对VLA模型进行有效的遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLA模型中的不良知识分布在视觉编码器、跨模态投影器和语言骨干中，部分遗忘仅作用于视觉或语言模块效果不足，传统遗忘基线在具身场景下存在残留遗忘或效用损失。
analysis.method: VLA-Forget混合遗忘框架，结合比率感知选择性编辑（处理感知和跨模态特异性）和层选择性推理/动作遗忘（保留效用），联合优化三个目标：目标遗忘、感知保留和推理保持，通过分阶段更新视觉编码器、投影器和动作生成Transformer块实现。
contributions: 提出首个针对VLA模型的遗忘框架VLA-Forget，解决跨模态分布式知识遗忘问题。
设计比率感知选择性编辑和层选择性遗忘策略，在遗忘效果、感知保留和推理保持上取得平衡。
在遗忘集和保留任务上验证，遗忘效果提升10%，感知特异性保留提升22%，推理和任务成功率提升9%，量化后恢复降低55%。
analysis.experiments: 在遗忘集行为探测和保留任务评估上，VLA-Forget相比强遗忘基线，遗忘效果提升10%，感知特异性保留提升22%，推理和任务成功率提升9%，量化后恢复降低55%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLA架构（如OpenVLA），泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论遗忘后模型在更广泛任务上的长期稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLA-Forget框架，针对VLA模型实现安全遗忘，在遗忘效果、感知保留和推理保持上均优于基线。

papers.title: Symbolic-Vector Attention Fusion for Collective Intelligence
papers.abstract: When autonomous agents observe different domains of a shared environment, each signal they exchange mixes relevant and irrelevant dimensions. No existing mechanism lets the receiver evaluate which dimensions to absorb. We introduce Symbolic-Vector Attention Fusion (SVAF), the content-evaluation half of a two-level coupling engine for collective intelligence. SVAF decomposes each inter-agent signal into 7 typed semantic fields, evaluates each through a learned fusion gate, and produces a remix -- new knowledge from the intersection of two domains. A band-pass model yields four outcomes (redundant, aligned, guarded, rejected), solving both selectivity and redundancy. The fusion gate independently discovers a cross-domain relevance hierarchy: mood emerges as the highest-weight field by epoch 1, before accuracy plateaus -- consistent with independent mechanistic evidence that LLM emotion representations are structurally embedded along valence-arousal axes. SVAF forms Layer 4 of the Mesh Memory Protocol (MMP); the other half of the coupling engine is a per-agent Closed-form Continuous-time (CfC) neural network at Layer 6, whose learned per-neuron time constants (tau) create the temporal dynamics from which collective intelligence emerges: fast neurons synchronise affect across agents in seconds, while slow neurons preserve domain expertise indefinitely. SVAF determines what enters each agent's cognitive state; CfC determines how that state evolves. Trained on 237K samples from 273 narrative scenarios, SVAF achieves 78.7% three-class accuracy. We verify the complete mesh cognition loop -- from per-field evaluation through remix, CfC state evolution, tau-modulated peer blending, and autonomous action -- in a live deployment with 7 nodes across macOS, iOS, and web.

analysis.tldr: 提出符号-向量注意力融合（SVAF）机制，让多智能体系统在通信中按语义字段选择性融合信息，实现集体智能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机制无法让接收智能体评估通信信号中哪些维度值得吸收，导致信息冗余与无关干扰，限制了集体智能的效率。
analysis.problem: 如何让自主智能体在交换信号时，根据内容相关性选择性融合来自不同领域的信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SVAF将智能体间信号分解为7个类型化语义字段，通过可学习的融合门评估每个字段，产生重混知识；结合CfC神经网络实现时间动态。
contributions: 提出SVAF机制，实现跨域信号的选择性融合与冗余解决。
在7节点真实部署中验证了完整的网格认知回路。
analysis.experiments: 在273个叙事场景的237K样本上训练，SVAF达到78.7%的三类准确率；并在macOS/iOS/Web的7节点部署中验证。
limitations: 仅验证了叙事场景，泛化性未知。
78.7%准确率在关键任务中可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出符号-向量注意力融合（SVAF）机制，让多智能体系统在通信中按语义字段选择性融合信息，实现集体智能。

papers.title: Multimodal Structure Learning: Disentangling Shared and Specific Topology via Cross-Modal Graphical Lasso
papers.abstract: Learning interpretable multimodal representations inherently relies on uncovering the conditional dependencies between heterogeneous features. However, sparse graph estimation techniques, such as Graphical Lasso (GLasso), to visual-linguistic domains is severely bottlenecked by high-dimensional noise, modality misalignment, and the confounding of shared versus category-specific topologies. In this paper, we propose Cross-Modal Graphical Lasso (CM-GLasso) that overcomes these fundamental limitations. By coupling a novel text-visualization strategy with a unified vision-language encoder, we strictly align multimodal features into a shared latent space. We introduce a cross-attention distillation mechanism that condenses high-dimensional patches into explicit semantic nodes, naturally extracting spatial-aware cross-modal priors. Furthermore, we unify tailored GLasso estimation and Common-Specific Structure Learning (CSSL) into a joint objective optimized via the Alternating Direction Method of Multiplier (ADMM). This formulation guarantees the simultaneous disentanglement of invariant and class-specific precision matrices without multi-step error accumulation. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks covering both natural and medical domains demonstrate that CM-GLasso establishes a new state-of-the-art in generative classification and dense semantic segmentation tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态图形套索（CM-GLasso），通过联合优化共享与特定拓扑结构，实现多模态表征的可解释解耦。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏图估计方法（如Graphical Lasso）在视觉-语言领域受限于高维噪声、模态不对齐以及共享与类别特定拓扑的混淆，难以学习可解释的多模态表征。
analysis.problem: 如何在高维、异构的多模态数据中同时估计共享和类别特定的条件依赖结构，并实现特征对齐与解耦。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接应用GLasso到视觉-语言领域存在三大瓶颈：高维噪声、模态不对齐、共享与特定拓扑的混淆。
analysis.method: 提出Cross-Modal Graphical Lasso (CM-GLasso)，包含文本可视化策略和对齐的视觉-语言编码器，通过交叉注意力蒸馏将高维补丁压缩为语义节点，并联合优化GLasso估计与通用-特定结构学习（CSSL），使用ADMM求解。
contributions: 提出CM-GLasso框架，首次将GLasso扩展到多模态场景并实现共享与特定拓扑的解耦。
设计文本可视化策略和交叉注意力蒸馏机制，实现模态对齐和语义节点提取。
在8个自然和医学领域基准上取得生成分类和密集语义分割的SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在8个涵盖自然和医学领域的基准上进行了生成分类和密集语义分割实验，达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉-语言编码器的质量。
ADMM优化在大规模数据上的计算效率有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态图形套索（CM-GLasso），通过联合优化共享与特定拓扑结构，实现多模态表征的可解释解耦。

papers.title: Diagonal-Tiled Mixed-Precision Attention for Efficient Low-Bit MXFP Inference
papers.abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of real-world tasks, but their inference cost remains prohibitively high due to the quadratic complexity of attention and the memory bandwidth limitations of high-precision operations. In this work, we present a low-bit mixed-precision attention kernel using the microscaling floating-point (MXFP) data format, utilizing the computing capability on next-generation GPU architectures. Our Diagonal-Tiled Mixed-Precision Attention (DMA) incorporates two kinds of low-bit computation at the tiling-level, and is a delicate fused kernel implemented using Triton, exploiting hardware-level parallelism and memory efficiency to enable fast and efficient inference without compromising model performance. Extensive empirical evaluations on NVIDIA B200 GPUs show that our kernel maintains generation quality with negligible degradation, and meanwhile achieves significant speedup by kernel fusion. We release our code at https://github.com/yifu-ding/MP-Sparse-Attn.

analysis.tldr: 提出对角分块混合精度注意力机制，利用MXFP低比特格式加速LLM推理。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer大模型推理成本高，主要源于注意力的二次复杂度和高精度运算的内存带宽限制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用低比特混合精度计算和硬件级并行，在不显著降低模型质量的前提下加速LLM推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出对角分块混合精度注意力（DMA），在分块级别使用两种低比特MXFP计算，并通过Triton实现融合内核，利用硬件并行和内存效率。
contributions: 提出基于MXFP的低比特混合精度注意力内核DMA。
在NVIDIA B200 GPU上实现显著加速，且生成质量下降可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA B200 GPU上评估，显示生成质量保持且速度提升，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于支持MXFP的特定GPU架构。
未讨论不同模型规模下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对角分块混合精度注意力机制，利用MXFP低比特格式加速LLM推理。

papers.title: Cactus: Accelerating Auto-Regressive Decoding with Constrained Acceptance Speculative Sampling
papers.abstract: Speculative sampling (SpS) has been successful in accelerating the decoding throughput of auto-regressive large language models by leveraging smaller draft models. SpS strictly enforces the generated distribution to match that of the verifier LLM. This is unnecessarily restrictive as slight variations of the verifier's distribution, such as sampling with top-$k$ or temperature, would also be acceptable. Typical acceptance sampling (TAS) alleviates this issue by accepting more tokens using entropy-based heuristics. However, this approach distorts the verifier distribution, potentially degrading output quality when the verifier encodes critical information. In this work, we formalize the speculative sampling algorithm through the lens of constrained optimization. Based on this formulation, we propose Cactus (constrained acceptance speculative sampling), a method that guarantees controlled divergence from the verifier distribution and increasing acceptance rates. Empirical results across a wide range of benchmarks confirm the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: Cactus通过约束优化框架在保证与验证模型分布可控偏差的同时提高投机采样接受率，加速自回归解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 投机采样通过小模型加速大模型解码，但严格匹配验证模型分布限制了接受率；现有方法如TAS虽提高接受率却扭曲分布，可能降低输出质量。
analysis.problem: 如何在加速自回归解码时，在保证生成分布与验证模型分布偏差可控的前提下，提高投机采样的接受率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 严格匹配验证模型分布是不必要的，因为top-k或温度采样等轻微变化也可接受；TAS通过熵启发式接受更多token但扭曲分布。
analysis.method: 提出Cactus（约束接受投机采样），基于约束优化形式化投机采样，在保证与验证模型分布有界偏差的同时最大化接受率。
contributions: 将投机采样形式化为约束优化问题
提出Cactus方法，在可控分布偏差下提高接受率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销以维持约束
对约束边界的选取敏感
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Cactus通过约束优化框架在保证与验证模型分布可控偏差的同时提高投机采样接受率，加速自回归解码。

papers.title: SafeCtrl: Region-Aware Safety Control for Text-to-Image Diffusion via Detect-Then-Suppress
papers.abstract: The widespread deployment of text-to-image diffusion models is significantly challenged by the generation of visually harmful content, such as sexually explicit content, violence, and horror imagery. Common safety interventions, ranging from input filtering to model concept erasure, often suffer from two critical limitations: (1) a severe trade-off between safety and context preservation, where removing unsafe concepts degrades the fidelity of the safe content, and (2) vulnerability to adversarial attacks, where safety mechanisms are easily bypassed. To address these challenges, we propose SafeCtrl, a Region-Aware safety control framework operating on a Detect-Then-Suppress paradigm. Unlike global safety interventions, SafeCtrl first employs an attention-guided Detect module to precisely localize specific risk regions. Subsequently, a localized Suppress module, optimized via image-level Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), neutralizes harmful semantics only within the detected areas, effectively transforming unsafe objects into safe alternatives while leaving the surrounding context intact. Extensive experiments across multiple risk categories demonstrate that SafeCtrl achieves a superior trade-off between safety and fidelity compared to state-of-the-art methods. Crucially, our approach exhibits improved resilience against adversarial prompt attacks, offering a precise and robust solution for responsible generation.

analysis.tldr: SafeCtrl通过检测-抑制范式实现文本到图像扩散模型的安全控制，在保持图像保真度的同时精准消除有害内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型生成有害内容（如色情、暴力）带来安全挑战，现有方法在安全性与上下文保真度之间存在严重权衡，且易受对抗攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证图像保真度的前提下，精准消除特定区域的有害语义，并提升对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有安全干预方法（如输入过滤、概念擦除）存在两个关键局限：安全性与上下文保真度之间的严重权衡，以及易被对抗攻击绕过。
analysis.method: 提出SafeCtrl框架，采用检测-抑制范式：首先通过注意力引导的检测模块定位风险区域，然后利用图像级直接偏好优化（DPO）的局部抑制模块仅在该区域中和有害语义，将不安全对象转换为安全替代物，同时保持周围上下文不变。
contributions: 提出区域感知的安全控制框架SafeCtrl，实现精准的有害内容定位与局部抑制。
引入图像级直接偏好优化（DPO）优化抑制模块，在保持保真度的同时有效消除有害语义。
实验证明SafeCtrl在安全性与保真度权衡上优于现有方法，并对对抗提示攻击具有更强鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖注意力图的质量，对复杂场景的定位精度有限。
DPO优化需要大量安全/不安全图像对，数据收集成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeCtrl通过检测-抑制范式实现文本到图像扩散模型的安全控制，在保持图像保真度的同时精准消除有害内容。
