papers.title: Conformal PM2.5 Mapping Under Spatial Covariate Shift: Satellite-Reanalysis Fusion for Africa's Green Industrial Transition
papers.abstract: Africa's green industrialization imperative demands reliable infrastructure for monitoring air quality. We present a satellite-reanalysis PM2.5 fusion system trained on 2,068,901 records from 404 monitoring locations in 29 African countries (OpenAQ, 2017-2022), combining LightGBM with leakage-resistant spatial cross-validation and conformal prediction to quantify predictions and their geographic applicability limits. Under 5-fold location-grouped spatial cross-validation, LightGBM achieves RMSE = 30.83 +/- 5.07 ug/m3, MAE = 14.54 +/- 1.66 ug/m3, R2 = 0.134 +/- 0.023, and macro F1 = 0.336 +/- 0.018. This R2 is substantially below random-split benchmarks (>0.90) but reflects true geographic generalisation difficulty rather than model failure. Split conformal prediction targeting 90% marginal coverage reveals severe East Africa degradation (actual PICP = 65.3% vs. nominal 90%), consistent with medium-strength covariate shift (humidity KS = 0.2237, sat_pblh KS = 0.2558). We operationalise these findings through regional reliability flags (High/Medium/Low/Unreliable) and a monitor prioritisation score directing infrastructure expansion toward highest-burden unmonitored populations, directly supporting Africa's green industrial transition and SDGs 3.9, 7.1.2, 9, 11.6.2, and 13.

analysis.tldr: 针对非洲PM2.5监测，提出结合LightGBM与共形预测的卫星再分析融合系统，揭示空间协变量偏移导致东非预测退化，并输出区域可靠性标志指导监测扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 非洲绿色工业转型需要可靠的空气质量监测基础设施，但现有监测站点稀疏，卫星再分析融合模型面临空间协变量偏移挑战，传统随机划分评估高估泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 在空间协变量偏移下，如何准确量化PM2.5预测及其地理适用性限制，并指导监测网络扩展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 空间交叉验证下R²仅0.134，远低于随机划分的>0.90，表明真实地理泛化困难而非模型失效；东非区域共形预测覆盖度仅65.3%（目标90%），与中等强度协变量偏移一致（湿度KS=0.2237，边界层高度KS=0.2558）。
analysis.method: 使用LightGBM结合抗泄漏空间交叉验证和共形预测，训练于29个非洲国家404个监测点的2,068,901条记录，输出预测及其地理适用性界限，并生成区域可靠性标志和监测优先级评分。
contributions: 提出卫星再分析PM2.5融合系统，结合空间交叉验证和共形预测，量化预测不确定性及地理适用性。
揭示空间协变量偏移导致东非预测退化，并输出区域可靠性标志和监测优先级评分，直接支持非洲绿色工业转型和SDGs。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenAQ 2017-2022数据上，5折位置分组空间交叉验证下LightGBM的RMSE=30.83±5.07 μg/m³，MAE=14.54±1.66 μg/m³，R²=0.134±0.023，macro F1=0.336±0.018；共形预测目标90%边际覆盖，东非实际PICP=65.3%。
limitations: R²较低，模型预测精度有限，可能无法满足高精度应用需求。
共形预测仅针对边际覆盖，未提供条件覆盖保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对非洲PM2.5监测，提出结合LightGBM与共形预测的卫星再分析融合系统，揭示空间协变量偏移导致东非预测退化，并输出区域可靠性标志指导监测扩展。

papers.title: Towards Verified and Targeted Explanations through Formal Methods
papers.abstract: As deep neural networks are deployed in safety-critical domains such as autonomous driving and medical diagnosis, stakeholders need explanations that are interpretable but also trustworthy with formal guarantees. Existing XAI methods fall short: heuristic attribution techniques (e.g., LIME, Integrated Gradients) highlight influential features but offer no mathematical guarantees about decision boundaries, while formal methods verify robustness yet remain untargeted, analyzing the nearest boundary regardless of whether it represents a critical risk. In safety-critical systems, not all misclassifications carry equal consequences; confusing a "Stop" sign for a "60 kph" sign is far more dangerous than confusing it with a "No Passing" sign. We introduce ViTaX (Verified and Targeted Explanations), a formal XAI framework that generates targeted semifactual explanations with mathematical guarantees. For a given input (class y) and a user-specified critical alternative (class t), ViTaX: (1) identifies the minimal feature subset most sensitive to the y->t transition, and (2) applies formal reachability analysis to guarantee that perturbing these features by epsilon cannot flip the classification to t. We formalize this through Targeted epsilon-Robustness, certifying whether a feature subset remains robust under perturbation toward a specific target class. ViTaX is the first method to provide formally guaranteed explanations of a model's resilience against user-identified alternatives. Evaluations on MNIST, GTSRB, EMNIST, and TaxiNet demonstrate over 30% fidelity improvement with minimal explanation cardinality.

analysis.tldr: 提出ViTaX框架，通过形式化方法生成针对特定目标类别的半事实解释，并提供数学保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有XAI方法要么缺乏数学保证（如LIME），要么形式化验证未针对特定风险类别，无法满足安全关键场景中不同误分类后果差异大的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有数学保证的、针对用户指定的关键替代类别的解释，以验证模型对该类别的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ViTaX框架：1) 识别对从原始类别y到目标类别t的转变最敏感的最小特征子集；2) 应用形式化可达性分析，保证扰动这些特征不超过epsilon时不会导致分类变为t。形式化为Targeted epsilon-Robustness。
contributions: 首次提供针对用户指定替代类别的形式化保证解释的方法。
在多个数据集上实现超过30%的保真度提升，且解释基数最小。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、GTSRB、EMNIST和TaxiNet上评估，保真度提升超过30%，解释基数最小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务，对其他任务（如回归）需扩展。
形式化分析的计算成本可能较高，尤其在高维输入上。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ViTaX框架，通过形式化方法生成针对特定目标类别的半事实解释，并提供数学保证。

papers.title: Supervised Dimensionality Reduction Revisited: Why LDA on Frozen CNN Features Deserves a Second Look
papers.abstract: Frozen pretrained image representations are widely used for transfer learning: a backbone is kept fixed, feature vectors are extracted, and a lightweight classifier is trained on top. This pipeline usually feeds the full feature vector to the classifier, even when the target task has far fewer classes than the pretraining task. We revisit a classical alternative: supervised dimensionality reduction with Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA) before linear probing. We evaluate ten dimensionality-reduction strategies on frozen features from six backbones -- ResNet-18, ResNet-50, MobileNetV3-Small, EfficientNet-B0, ViT-B/16, and DINOv2-ViT-S/14 -- across CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet, and CUB-200-2011. Under a fixed logistic-regression protocol, LDA improves accuracy over full features in 11 of 12 coarse-grained configurations, with gains up to 4.5 percentage points while reducing feature dimensionality by 48-87%. The same projection consistently hurts on fine-grained CUB-200, where full features win across all six backbones. This establishes a practical boundary condition: LDA is useful when class-level structure is coarse enough to be captured by mean-separating directions, but it can discard subtle cues needed for fine-grained recognition. We also compare LDA with PCA, PCA+LDA, regularized LDA, Local Fisher Discriminant Analysis, Neighbourhood Components Analysis, and three lightweight LDA extensions. The results show that plain LDA offers the best accuracy-cost tradeoff for most coarse-grained settings, while more complex supervised reduction methods rarely justify their additional cost. Overall, the study provides concrete guidance for when post-hoc supervised projection should, and should not, be inserted into frozen-feature image classification pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 在冻结CNN特征上使用LDA进行监督降维，在粗粒度分类中能提升精度并大幅降维，但在细粒度任务中会丢失细节信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 迁移学习中常用冻结预训练特征加线性分类器，但特征维度高且与目标类别数不匹配，传统降维方法LDA被忽视，需要重新评估其适用条件。
analysis.problem: 确定在冻结特征线性探测前，使用LDA进行监督降维何时有效、何时有害。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LDA在粗粒度分类（CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet）中提升精度并大幅降维，但在细粒度分类（CUB-200）中始终降低性能，表明LDA依赖类均值分离方向，会丢弃细粒度判别细节。
analysis.method: 在冻结的CNN特征上应用LDA降维，然后训练逻辑回归分类器，并与PCA、PCA+LDA、正则化LDA、局部Fisher判别分析、邻域成分分析等方法比较。
contributions: 系统评估了十种降维策略在六种骨干网络和三个数据集上的表现，发现LDA在粗粒度任务中具有最佳精度-成本权衡。
揭示了LDA的适用边界：当类别结构足够粗糙时有效，细粒度任务中会丢失关键信息。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet和CUB-200-2011上，使用ResNet-18、ResNet-50、MobileNetV3-Small、EfficientNet-B0、ViT-B/16和DINOv2-ViT-S/14六种骨干网络，固定逻辑回归协议。LDA在11/12粗粒度配置中提升精度，最高4.5个百分点，降维48-87%；在CUB-200上所有骨干均下降。
limitations: 仅评估了线性分类器，未探索非线性分类器或微调场景。
数据集有限，未涵盖更多领域或更大规模数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在冻结CNN特征上使用LDA进行监督降维，在粗粒度分类中能提升精度并大幅降维，但在细粒度任务中会丢失细节信息。

papers.title: CODE-GEN: A Human-in-the-Loop RAG-Based Agentic AI System for Multiple-Choice Question Generation
papers.abstract: We present CODE-GEN, a human-in-the-Loop, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)-based agentic AI system for generating context-aligned multiple-choice questions to develop student code reasoning and comprehension abilities. CODE-GEN employs an agentic AI architecture in which a Generator agent produces multiple-choice coding comprehension questions aligned with course-specific learning objectives, while a Validator agent independently assesses content quality across seven pedagogical dimensions. Both agents are augmented with specialized tools that enhance computational accuracy and verify code outputs. To evaluate the effectiveness of CODE-GEN, we conducted an evaluation study involving six human subject-matter experts (SMEs) who judged 288 AI-generated questions. The SMEs produced a total of 2,016 human-AI rating pairs, indicating agreement or disagreement with the assessments of Validator, along with 131 instances of qualitative feedback. Analyses of SME judgments show strong system performance, with human-validated success rates ranging from 79.9% to 98.6% across the seven pedagogical dimensions. The analysis of qualitative feedback reveals that CODE-GEN achieves high reliability on dimensions well suited to computational verification and explicit criteria matching, including question clarity, code validity, concept alignment, and correct answer validity. In contrast, human expertise remains essential for dimensions requiring deeper instructional judgment, such as designing pedagogically meaningful distractors and providing high-quality feedback that reinforces understanding. These findings inform the strategic allocation of human and AI effort in AI-assisted educational content generation.

analysis.tldr: CODE-GEN 是一个基于 RAG 和人在回路的智能体系统，用于生成编程选择题，在七个教学维度上达到 79.9%-98.6% 的人类验证成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育领域需要高效生成高质量、与课程对齐的编程选择题，以培养学生的代码推理和理解能力，但现有方法在内容质量和教学维度覆盖上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个结合人类专家和 AI 的系统，以生成符合教学目标的多选题，并确保内容在多个教学维度上的质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统在适合计算验证的维度（如问题清晰度、代码有效性）表现优异，但在需要深度教学判断的维度（如设计有意义的干扰项、提供高质量反馈）仍需人类专家介入。
analysis.method: 提出 CODE-GEN 系统，包含一个生成器智能体（Generator）和一个验证器智能体（Validator），两者均配备专用工具以增强计算准确性和代码输出验证，并采用人在回路机制。
contributions: 提出一种结合 RAG 和人在回路的智能体架构，用于生成编程选择题。
通过人类专家评估验证了系统在七个教学维度上的有效性，并分析了 AI 与人类分工的边界。
analysis.experiments: 6 位人类专家评估了 288 个 AI 生成的问题，产生 2016 个人机评分对和 131 条定性反馈，人类验证成功率在 79.9% 到 98.6% 之间。
limitations: 评估仅涉及 6 位专家，样本量有限。
系统在需要深度教学判断的维度上仍依赖人类，可能限制完全自动化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CODE-GEN 是一个基于 RAG 和人在回路的智能体系统，用于生成编程选择题，在七个教学维度上达到 79.9%-98.6% 的人类验证成功率。

papers.title: AdaptFuse: Training-Free Sequential Preference Learning via Externalized Bayesian Inference
papers.abstract: Large language models struggle to accumulate evidence across multiple rounds of user interaction, failing to update their beliefs in a manner consistent with Bayesian inference. Existing solutions require fine-tuning on sensitive user interaction data, limiting their applicability in privacy-conscious settings. We propose AdaptFuse, a training-free framework that externalizes probabilistic computation entirely from the LLM: a symbolic module maintains a Bayesian posterior over a discrete hypothesis set, while a frozen LLM contributes semantic reasoning via multi-sample Dirichlet aggregation. The two signals are combined through entropy-adaptive fusion, which automatically weights each source by its predictive confidence, shifting reliance from the LLM to the symbolic posterior as evidence accumulates. We evaluate across three domains: flight recommendation, hotel recommendation, and web shopping; on Gemma 2 9B, Llama 3 8B, and Qwen 2.5 7B. AdaptFuse consistently outperforms both prompting baselines and fine-tuned Bayesian Teaching models on all tasks, with accuracy improving monotonically over interaction rounds. These results demonstrate that principled inference-time algorithms can substitute for fine-tuning in personalized recommendation, without storing or training on sensitive user data. All the code and materials will be open-sourced.

analysis.tldr: AdaptFuse通过外部化贝叶斯推理实现无需训练的序列偏好学习，在多个推荐任务上超越微调方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在多轮交互中难以积累证据并更新信念，现有方法需要微调敏感用户数据，限制了隐私敏感场景的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调且不存储用户数据的情况下，让LLM在序列交互中实现贝叶斯一致的信念更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AdaptFuse框架，将概率计算外化：符号模块维护离散假设集上的贝叶斯后验，冻结的LLM通过多样本狄利克雷聚合提供语义推理，两者通过熵自适应融合加权。
contributions: 提出训练自由的序列偏好学习框架，无需微调或存储用户数据。
设计熵自适应融合机制，根据预测置信度动态平衡符号后验与LLM推理。
在三个推荐领域和多个模型上验证，一致优于提示基线及微调方法。
analysis.experiments: 在航班推荐、酒店推荐和网络购物三个领域，使用Gemma 2 9B、Llama 3 8B和Qwen 2.5 7B进行评估，AdaptFuse在所有任务上一致优于提示基线和微调的贝叶斯教学模型，且准确率随交互轮次单调提升。
limitations: 依赖离散假设集，可能无法覆盖连续或开放空间。
仅评估了推荐任务，其他序列交互场景未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaptFuse通过外部化贝叶斯推理实现无需训练的序列偏好学习，在多个推荐任务上超越微调方法。

papers.title: Uncertainty as a Planning Signal: Multi-Turn Decision Making for Goal-Oriented Conversation
papers.abstract: Goal-oriented conversational systems require making sequential decisions under uncertainty about the user's intent, where the algorithm must balance information acquisition and target commitment over multiple turns. Existing approaches address this challenge from different perspectives: structured methods enable multi-step planning but rely on predefined schemas, while LLM-based approaches support flexible interactions but lack long-horizon decision making, resulting in poor coordination between information acquisition and target commitment. To address this limitation, we formulate goal-oriented conversation as an uncertainty-aware sequential decision problem, where uncertainty serves as a guiding signal for multi-turn decision making. We propose a Conversation Uncertainty-aware Planning framework (CUP) that integrates language models with structured planning: a language model proposes feasible actions, and a planner evaluates their long-term impact on uncertainty reduction. Experiments on multiple conversational benchmarks show that CUP consistently improves success rates while requiring fewer interaction turns. Further analysis demonstrates that uncertainty-aware planning contributes to more efficient information acquisition and earlier confident commitment.

analysis.tldr: 提出将不确定性作为规划信号，结合语言模型与结构化规划实现多轮目标导向对话决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么依赖预定义模式进行结构化规划，要么基于LLM灵活但缺乏长程决策能力，导致信息获取与目标承诺之间协调不佳。
analysis.problem: 目标导向对话中如何在多轮交互下平衡信息获取与目标承诺，实现高效决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CUP框架，集成语言模型与结构化规划：语言模型提出可行动作，规划器评估动作对不确定性降低的长期影响。
contributions: 将目标导向对话形式化为不确定性感知的序贯决策问题，以不确定性作为规划信号。
提出CUP框架，结合语言模型的灵活性与结构化规划的长期决策能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个对话基准上，CUP在提高成功率的同时减少了交互轮次。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的语言模型生成可行动作。
规划器的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将不确定性作为规划信号，结合语言模型与结构化规划实现多轮目标导向对话决策。

papers.title: Interpreting Video Representations with Spatio-Temporal Sparse Autoencoders
papers.abstract: We present the first systematic study of Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) on video representations. Standard SAEs decompose video into interpretable, monosemantic features but destroy temporal coherence: hard TopK selection produces unstable feature assignments across frames, reducing autocorrelation by 36%. We propose spatio-temporal contrastive objectives and Matryoshka hierarchical grouping that recover and even exceed raw temporal coherence. The contrastive loss weight controls a tunable trade-off between reconstruction and temporal coherence. A systematic ablation on two backbones and two datasets shows that different configurations excel at different goals: reconstruction fidelity, temporal coherence, action discrimination, or interpretability. Contrastive SAE features improve action classification by +3.9% over raw features and text-video retrieval by up to 2.8xR@1. A cross-backbone analysis reveals that standard monosemanticity metrics contain a backbone-alignment artifact: both DINOv2 and VideoMAE produce equally monosemantic features under neutral (CLIP) similarity. Causal ablation confirms that contrastive training concentrates predictive signal into a small number of identifiable features.

analysis.tldr: 提出时空稀疏自编码器，通过对比学习和分层分组提升视频表征的可解释性与时间连贯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频表征的可解释性对安全与调试至关重要，但现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）在视频上会破坏时间连贯性，导致特征分配不稳定。
analysis.problem: 标准SAE在视频表征中产生不稳定的帧间特征分配，降低时间自相关性，且缺乏针对视频的专门设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准SAE的硬TopK选择导致特征分配不稳定，时间自相关性下降36%；单义性度量存在骨干对齐伪影。
analysis.method: 提出时空对比目标（spatio-temporal contrastive objectives）和Matryoshka分层分组（Matryoshka hierarchical grouping），通过对比损失权重调节重建与时间连贯性的权衡。
contributions: 首次系统研究SAE在视频表征上的应用，揭示时间连贯性问题。
提出时空对比目标和分层分组方法，恢复并超越原始时间连贯性。
在动作分类和文本-视频检索上取得显著提升，并发现单义性度量的骨干对齐伪影。
analysis.experiments: 在两个骨干网络（DINOv2、VideoMAE）和两个数据集上进行系统消融，对比不同配置在重建保真度、时间连贯性、动作判别和可解释性上的表现。
limitations: 可能依赖特定骨干网络和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
对比损失权重调节需要手动选择，可能增加调参成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时空稀疏自编码器，通过对比学习和分层分组提升视频表征的可解释性与时间连贯性。

papers.title: Automating Cloud Security and Forensics Through a Secure-by-Design Generative AI Framework
papers.abstract: As cloud environments become increasingly complex, cybersecurity and forensic investigations must evolve to meet emerging threats. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise in automating log analysis and reasoning tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks and lack forensic rigor. To address these dual challenges, we propose a unified, secure-by-design GenAI framework that integrates PromptShield and the Cloud Investigation Automation Framework (CIAF). PromptShield proactively defends LLMs against adversarial prompts using ontology-driven validation that standardizes user inputs and mitigates manipulation. CIAF streamlines cloud forensic investigations through structured, ontology-based reasoning across all six phases of the forensic process. We evaluate our system on real-world datasets from AWS and Microsoft Azure, demonstrating substantial improvements in both LLM security and forensic accuracy. Experimental results show PromptShield boosts classification performance under attack conditions, achieving precision, recall, and F1 scores above 93%, while CIAF enhances ransomware detection accuracy in cloud logs using Likert-transformed performance features. Our integrated framework advances the automation, interpretability, and trustworthiness of cloud forensics and LLM-based systems, offering a scalable foundation for real-time, AI-driven incident response across diverse cloud infrastructures.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个安全设计的生成式AI框架，结合PromptShield和CIAF，提升云安全与取证中的LLM鲁棒性和取证准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 云环境日益复杂，网络安全和取证调查需要进化以应对新兴威胁；LLM在自动化日志分析和推理方面有潜力，但易受提示注入攻击且缺乏取证严谨性。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决LLM在云安全与取证中的提示注入脆弱性和取证流程缺乏结构化、可解释性的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个统一的安全设计GenAI框架，包含PromptShield（基于本体驱动的验证防御对抗性提示）和CIAF（基于本体推理的云取证自动化框架，覆盖取证六个阶段）。
contributions: 提出PromptShield，一种基于本体驱动的验证方法，用于防御LLM的提示注入攻击。
提出CIAF，一种结构化、基于本体推理的云取证自动化框架。
在AWS和Azure真实数据集上验证了框架在LLM安全和取证准确性上的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在AWS和Azure真实数据集上评估，PromptShield在攻击条件下分类性能达到93%以上的精确率、召回率和F1分数；CIAF使用Likert变换性能特征提升了云日志中勒索软件检测准确性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定云平台的数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
框架复杂度较高，实时部署可能面临计算开销挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个安全设计的生成式AI框架，结合PromptShield和CIAF，提升云安全与取证中的LLM鲁棒性和取证准确性。

papers.title: DC-Ada: Reward-Only Decentralized Sensor Adaptation for Heterogeneous Multi-Robot Teams
papers.abstract: Heterogeneity is a defining feature of deployed multi-robot teams: platforms often differ in sensing modalities, ranges, fields of view, and failure patterns. Controllers trained under nominal sensing can degrade sharply when deployed on robots with missing or mismatched sensors, even when the task and action interface are unchanged. We present DC-Ada, a reward-only decentralized adaptation method that keeps a pretrained shared policy frozen and instead adapts compact per-robot observation transforms to map heterogeneous sensing into a fixed inference interface. DC-Ada is gradient-free and communication-minimal: it uses budgeted accept/reject random search with short common-random-number rollouts under a strict step budget. We evaluate DC-Ada against four baselines in a deterministic 2D multi-robot simulator covering warehouse logistics, search and rescue, and collaborative mapping, across four heterogeneity regimes (H0--H3) and five seeds with a matched budget of $200{,}000$ joint environment steps per run. Results show that heterogeneity can substantially degrade a frozen shared policy and that no single mitigation dominates across all tasks and metrics. Observation normalization is strongest for reward robustness in warehouse logistics and competitive in search and rescue, while the frozen shared policy is strongest for reward in collaborative mapping. DC-Ada offers a useful complementary operating point: it improves completion most clearly in severe coverage-based mapping while requiring only scalar team returns and no policy fine-tuning or persistent communication. These results position DC-Ada as a practical deploy-time adaptation method for heterogeneous teams.

analysis.tldr: DC-Ada 是一种仅需奖励信号的去中心化传感器适配方法，通过紧凑的观测变换让异构多机器人团队无需微调策略即可适应传感器差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 异构多机器人团队中传感器差异（如不同感知模态、范围、视野）会导致共享策略性能严重下降，而现有方法通常需要重新训练或大量通信，不适用于实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持预训练共享策略冻结的前提下，让异构机器人仅通过自身传感器观测适应任务，且无需梯度计算和持续通信。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到异构性会显著降低冻结共享策略的性能，且没有单一方法在所有任务和指标上占优；观测归一化在仓库物流中鲁棒性最强，冻结策略在协作地图构建中奖励最高。
analysis.method: DC-Ada 为每个机器人学习一个紧凑的观测变换（映射到固定推理接口），使用预算化的接受/拒绝随机搜索，结合公共随机数短轨迹评估，仅需团队总奖励作为反馈。
contributions: 提出一种仅需奖励信号、无梯度的去中心化传感器适配方法，适用于异构多机器人团队。
在确定性2D多机器人模拟器上，覆盖仓库物流、搜索救援和协作地图构建三种任务及四种异构程度，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在确定性2D多机器人模拟器上，与四种基线对比，涵盖三种任务和四种异构程度（H0-H3），使用5个随机种子，每轮预算为200,000联合环境步。
limitations: 方法依赖短轨迹的公共随机数评估，可能不适用于随机性强的环境。
仅验证了确定性模拟环境，实际物理机器人上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DC-Ada 是一种仅需奖励信号的去中心化传感器适配方法，通过紧凑的观测变换让异构多机器人团队无需微调策略即可适应传感器差异。

papers.title: I-CALM: Incentivizing Confidence-Aware Abstention for LLM Hallucination Mitigation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) frequently produce confident but incorrect answers, partly because common binary scoring conventions reward answering over honestly expressing uncertainty. We study whether prompt-only interventions -- explicitly announcing reward schemes for answer-versus-abstain decisions plus humility-oriented normative principles -- can reduce hallucination risk without modifying the model. Our focus is epistemic abstention on factual questions with a verifiable answer, where current LLMs often fail to abstain despite being uncertain about their answers. We first assess self-reported verbal confidence as a usable uncertainty signal, showing stability under prompt paraphrasing and reasonable calibration against a token-probability baseline. We then study I-CALM, a prompt-based framework that (i) elicits verbal confidence, (ii) partially rewards abstention through explicit reward schemes, and (iii) adds lightweight normative principles emphasizing truthfulness, humility, and responsibility. Using GPT-5 mini on PopQA as the main setting, we find that confidence-eliciting, abstention-rewarding prompts, especially with norms, reduce the false-answer rate on answered cases mainly by identifying and shifting error-prone cases to abstention and re-calibrating their confidence. This trades coverage for reliability while leaving forced-answer performance largely unchanged. Varying the abstention reward yields a clear abstention-hallucination frontier. Overall, results show the framework can improve selective answering on factual questions without retraining, with the magnitude of effect varying across models and datasets. Code is available at the following https://github.com/binzeli/hallucinationControl.

analysis.tldr: 通过提示工程激励LLM主动弃权而非自信胡诌，有效降低幻觉率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常给出自信但错误的答案，现有评分机制鼓励回答而非诚实表达不确定性，导致幻觉问题严重。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型的情况下，通过纯提示干预激励LLM在不确定时主动弃权，从而减少幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在事实性问题中即使不确定也倾向于回答而非弃权；自报告置信度在提示改写下稳定且与token概率基线校准良好。
analysis.method: I-CALM框架：通过提示显式声明奖励方案（部分奖励弃权）并加入强调诚实、谦逊和责任的规范原则，结合置信度 elicitation。
contributions: 提出I-CALM，一种纯提示的置信感知弃权激励框架，无需微调即可减少幻觉。
在PopQA上验证了该方法能有效将错误答案转为弃权，并揭示弃权-幻觉权衡边界。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-5 mini上以PopQA为主设置进行实验，并跨模型和数据集验证效果。
limitations: 效果因模型和数据集而异，通用性需进一步验证。
仅针对事实性问题，对开放域或主观问题可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过提示工程激励LLM主动弃权而非自信胡诌，有效降低幻觉率。

papers.title: Convolutional Neural Network and Adversarial Autoencoder in EEG images classification
papers.abstract: In this paper, we consider applying computer vision algorithms for the classification problem one faces in neuroscience during EEG data analysis. Our approach is to apply a combination of computer vision and neural network methods to solve human brain activity classification problems during hand movement. We pre-processed raw EEG signals and generated 2D EEG topograms. Later, we developed supervised and semi-supervised neural networks to classify different motor cortex activities.

analysis.tldr: 结合CNN与对抗自编码器，利用2D脑电拓扑图分类手部运动时的脑活动。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索计算机视觉方法在脑电图数据分析中的应用，提升运动皮层活动分类的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效分类手部运动时不同的大脑运动皮层活动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始EEG信号经预处理生成2D拓扑图后，可借助图像分类技术区分不同运动状态。
analysis.main_method: 预处理EEG信号生成2D拓扑图，分别使用监督CNN和半监督对抗自编码器进行分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在手部运动EEG数据集上，对比监督与半监督方法的分类性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出将EEG信号转化为2D图像并利用CNN和对抗自编码器进行分类的新框架。
analysis.limitations: 未详细讨论模型泛化性及不同运动类型的扩展性。

papers.title: A Family of Open Time-Series Foundation Models for the Radio Access Network
papers.abstract: The Radio Access Network (RAN) is evolving into a programmable and disaggregated infrastructure that increasingly relies on AI-native algorithms for optimization and closed-loop control. However, current RAN intelligence is still largely built from task-specific models tailored to individual functions, resulting in model fragmentation, limited knowledge sharing across tasks, poor generalization, and increased system complexity. To address these limitations, we introduce TimeRAN, a unified multi-task learning framework for time-series modeling in the RAN. TimeRAN leverages a lightweight time-series foundation model with few task-specific heads to learn transferable representations that can be efficiently adapted across diverse tasks with limited supervision. To enable large-scale pretraining, we further curate and open-source TimeRAN DataPile, the largest time-series corpus for RAN analytics to date, comprising over 355K time series and 0.56B measurements across diverse telemetry sources, protocol layers, and deployment scenarios. We evaluate TimeRAN across a comprehensive set of RAN analytics tasks, including anomaly detection, classification, forecasting, and imputation, and show that it achieves state-of-the-art performance with minimal or no task-specific fine-tuning. Finally, we integrate TimeRAN into a proof-of-concept 5G testbed and demonstrate that it operates efficiently with limited resource requirements in real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TimeRAN，一个轻量级时间序列基础模型，用于无线接入网的多任务学习，在多个任务上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 RAN 智能依赖任务特定模型，导致碎片化、知识共享差、泛化弱和系统复杂。
analysis.problem: 解决 RAN 中时间序列建模的模型碎片化和缺乏统一基础模型的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RAN 中不同任务（如异常检测、分类、预测）使用独立模型，无法共享表示，增加部署成本。
analysis.main_method: 构建轻量级时间序列基础模型，搭配少量任务特定头，通过大规模预训练学习可迁移表示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在包含 355K+ 时间序列和 0.56B 测量的 TimeRAN DataPile 上预训练，评估异常检测、分类、预测和插补任务。
analysis.contributions: 提出 TimeRAN 框架和开源最大 RAN 时间序列数据集 TimeRAN DataPile，实现少样本 SOTA 性能。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论模型在极端异构或动态 RAN 场景下的鲁棒性，以及预训练计算成本。

papers.title: CavMerge: Merging K-means Based on Local Log-Concavity
papers.abstract: K-means clustering, a classic and widely-used clustering technique, is known to exhibit suboptimal performance when applied to non-linearly separable data. Numerous adjustments and modifications have been proposed to address this issue, including methods that merge K-means results from a relatively large K to obtain a final cluster assignment. However, existing methods of this nature often encounter computational inefficiencies and suffer from hyperparameter tuning. Here we present \emph{CavMerge}, a novel K-means merging algorithm that is intuitive, free of parameter tuning, and computationally efficient. Operating under minimal local distributional assumptions, our algorithm demonstrates strong consistency and rapid convergence guarantees. Empirical studies on various simulated and real datasets demonstrate that our method yields more reliable clusters in comparison to current state-of-the-art algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CavMerge 算法，基于局部对数凹性合并 K-means 聚类结果，无需调参且计算高效。
analysis.research_motivation: K-means 在非线性可分数据上表现不佳，现有合并方法计算效率低且需调参。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、无参数地合并 K-means 聚类结果以处理非线性可分数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: K-means 在大 K 值下可捕捉局部结构，但合并过程易受参数和计算瓶颈影响。
analysis.main_method: 基于局部对数凹性假设，设计无参数合并算法，利用密度形状信息合并聚类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上对比多种 SOTA 算法，验证聚类可靠性和效率。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个无参数、计算高效的 K-means 合并算法，具有强一致性和快速收敛保证。
analysis.limitations: 依赖局部对数凹性假设，可能不适用于复杂非凸分布。

papers.title: How Long short-term memory artificial neural network, synthetic data, and fine-tuning improve the classification of raw EEG data
papers.abstract: In this paper, we discuss a Machine Learning pipeline for the classification of EEG data. We propose a combination of synthetic data generation, long short-term memory artificial neural network (LSTM), and fine-tuning to solve classification problems for experiments with implicit visual stimuli, such as the Necker cube with different levels of ambiguity. The developed approach increased the quality of the classification model of raw EEG data.

analysis.tldr: 结合LSTM、合成数据生成和微调，提升原始EEG数据分类性能，用于隐式视觉刺激实验。
analysis.research_motivation: 原始EEG数据分类质量有限，需要更有效的方法处理隐式视觉刺激下的分类问题。
analysis.problem: 如何提高原始EEG数据在隐式视觉刺激（如Necker立方体）分类中的准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始EEG数据噪声大、样本有限，直接分类效果差；合成数据和微调可增强模型泛化能力。
analysis.main_method: 使用LSTM网络，结合合成数据生成和微调技术，构建机器学习流水线。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Necker立方体不同模糊度实验上测试，对比基线模型，验证分类质量提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种结合合成数据、LSTM和微调的流水线，显著提高原始EEG分类性能。
analysis.limitations: 依赖合成数据质量，可能对特定实验设置敏感，未讨论实时应用场景。

papers.title: DAGAF: A directed acyclic generative adversarial framework for joint structure learning and tabular data synthesis
papers.abstract: Understanding the causal relationships between data variables can provide crucial insights into the construction of tabular datasets. Most existing causality learning methods typically focus on applying a single identifiable causal model, such as the Additive Noise Model (ANM) or the Linear non-Gaussian Acyclic Model (LiNGAM), to discover the dependencies exhibited in observational data. We improve on this approach by introducing a novel dual-step framework capable of performing both causal structure learning and tabular data synthesis under multiple causal model assumptions. Our approach uses Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAG) to represent causal relationships among data variables. By applying various functional causal models including ANM, LiNGAM and the Post-Nonlinear model (PNL), we implicitly learn the contents of DAG to simulate the generative process of observational data, effectively replicating the real data distribution. This is supported by a theoretical analysis to explain the multiple loss terms comprising the objective function of the framework. Experimental results demonstrate that DAGAF outperforms many existing methods in structure learning, achieving significantly lower Structural Hamming Distance (SHD) scores across both real-world and benchmark datasets (Sachs: 47%, Child: 11%, Hailfinder: 5%, Pathfinder: 7% improvement compared to state-of-the-art), while being able to produce diverse, high-quality samples.

analysis.tldr: 提出DAGAF双步框架，联合因果结构学习与表格数据合成，在多个因果模型下优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果学习方法通常依赖单一因果模型，缺乏灵活性和数据合成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何同时进行因果结构学习与高质量表格数据合成，并适应多种因果模型假设。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同因果模型（如ANM、LiNGAM、PNL）能捕捉数据中不同依赖关系，但单一模型可能遗漏关键结构。
analysis.main_method: 使用有向无环图（DAG）表示因果关系，通过生成对抗网络（GAN）框架隐式学习DAG内容，并集成多种功能因果模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Sachs、Child、Hailfinder、Pathfinder等数据集上测试，SHD评分分别降低47%、11%、5%、7%，优于现有方法。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个联合因果结构学习与数据合成的双步框架，理论分析多损失目标函数，实验证明结构学习与样本质量双重提升。
analysis.limitations: 框架复杂度较高，可能对大规模高维数据扩展性有限；依赖因果模型假设的准确性。

papers.title: Entropy, Disagreement, and the Limits of Foundation Models in Genomics
papers.abstract: Foundation models in genomics have shown mixed success compared to their counterparts in natural language processing. Yet, the reasons for their limited effectiveness remain poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the role of entropy as a fundamental factor limiting the capacities of such models to learn from their training data and develop foundational capabilities. We train ensembles of models on text and DNA sequences and analyze their predictions, static embeddings, and empirical Fisher information flow. We show that the high entropy of genomic sequences -- from the point of view of unseen token prediction -- leads to near-uniform output distributions, disagreement across models, and unstable static embeddings, even for models that are matched in architecture, training and data. We then demonstrate that models trained on DNA concentrate Fisher information in embedding layers, seemingly failing to exploit inter-token relationships. Our results suggest that self-supervised training from sequences alone may not be applicable to genomic data, calling into question the assumptions underlying current methodologies for training genomic foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 基因组基础模型因序列高熵导致输出均匀、模型分歧和嵌入不稳定，自监督训练可能不适用。
analysis.research_motivation: 基因组基础模型效果不如NLP模型，但原因不明，需探究熵作为限制因素。
analysis.problem: 基因组序列的高熵如何限制基础模型从训练数据中学习并发展基础能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高熵导致模型预测接近均匀分布、模型间分歧大、静态嵌入不稳定，且Fisher信息集中在嵌入层而非利用token间关系。
analysis.main_method: 在文本和DNA序列上训练模型集成，分析预测、静态嵌入和Fisher信息流。
analysis.key_experiments: 比较匹配架构、训练和数据的模型在文本与DNA上的表现，观察输出分布、分歧和嵌入稳定性。
analysis.contributions: 揭示熵是限制基因组基础模型的关键因素，质疑当前自监督训练方法的适用性。
analysis.limitations: 未提出解决高熵问题的具体方法，实验可能限于特定模型和数据集。

papers.title: Adaptive Cost-Efficient Evaluation for Reliable Patent Claim Validation
papers.abstract: Automated validation of patent claims demands zero-defect tolerance, as even a single structural flaw can render a claim legally defective. Existing evaluation paradigms suffer from a rigidity-resource dilemma: lightweight encoders struggle with nuanced legal dependencies, while exhaustive verification via Large Language Models (LLMs) is prohibitively costly. To bridge this gap, we propose ACE (Adaptive Cost-efficient Evaluation), a hybrid framework that uses predictive entropy to route only high-uncertainty claims to an expert LLM. The expert then executes a Chain of Patent Thought (CoPT) protocol grounded in 35 U.S.C. statutory standards. This design enables ACE to handle long-range legal dependencies more effectively while preserving efficiency. ACE achieves the best F1 among the evaluated methods at 94.95\%, while reducing operational costs by 78\% compared to standalone LLM deployments. We also construct ACE-40k, a 40,000-claim benchmark with MPEP-grounded error annotations, to facilitate further research.

analysis.tldr: 提出ACE混合框架，通过预测熵路由高不确定性专利权利要求至专家LLM，结合CoPT协议，实现94.95% F1并降低78%成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有专利权利要求验证方法面临刚性-资源困境：轻量编码器难以处理法律依赖，而LLM全面验证成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证零缺陷容忍的前提下，实现专利权利要求验证的准确性与成本效率的平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 专利权利要求验证需要处理长距离法律依赖，且单一结构缺陷即可导致法律无效，现有方法无法兼顾准确性和资源效率。
analysis.main_method: 提出ACE框架，利用预测熵将高不确定性权利要求路由至专家LLM，并执行基于35 U.S.C.法定标准的专利思维链（CoPT）协议。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ACE-40k基准上评估，ACE达到94.95% F1，相比独立LLM部署降低78%运营成本。
analysis.contributions: 提出ACE混合验证框架和CoPT协议，构建ACE-40k基准数据集，显著提升验证效率与准确性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预测熵的阈值设定，可能影响路由决策的鲁棒性；CoPT协议对特定法律条款的泛化性待验证。

papers.title: High-Stakes Personalization: Rethinking LLM Customization for Individual Investor Decision-Making
papers.abstract: Personalized LLM systems have advanced rapidly, yet most operate in domains where user preferences are stable and ground truth is either absent or subjective. We argue that individual investor decision-making presents a uniquely challenging domain for LLM personalization - one that exposes fundamental limitations in current customization paradigms. Drawing on our system, built and deployed for AI-augmented portfolio management, we identify four axes along which individual investing exposes fundamental limitations in standard LLM customization: (1) behavioral memory complexity, where investor patterns are temporally evolving, self-contradictory, and financially consequential; (2) thesis consistency under drift, where maintaining coherent investment rationale over weeks or months strains stateless and session-bounded architectures; (3) style-signal tension, where the system must simultaneously respect personal investment philosophy and surface objective evidence that may contradict it; and (4) alignment without ground truth, where personalization quality cannot be evaluated against a fixed label set because outcomes are stochastic and delayed. We describe the architectural responses that emerged from building the system and propose open research directions for personalized NLP in high-stakes, temporally extended decision domains.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出个人投资者决策对LLM个性化构成独特挑战，暴露了当前定制范式的根本局限，并提出了四个关键问题轴。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM个性化系统多用于偏好稳定或主观领域，而个人投资决策具有高风险、时间延展和结果随机性，需要重新思考定制方法。
analysis.problem: 当前LLM个性化范式无法有效处理个人投资中行为记忆复杂、论点漂移、风格与信号冲突以及无真实标签对齐等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 投资者模式随时间演变且自相矛盾，投资论点需跨周月保持连贯，系统需平衡个人哲学与客观证据，且个性化质量因随机延迟结果难以评估。
analysis.main_method: 基于构建的AI增强投资组合管理系统，识别出四个关键问题轴，并描述了相应的架构响应。
analysis.key_experiments: 论文未提供具体实验，而是基于实际部署系统的经验分析。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统性地分析了个人投资决策对LLM个性化的独特挑战，提出了四个问题轴和开放研究方向。
analysis.limitations: 缺乏定量实验验证，仅基于单一系统经验，可能不适用于其他高风险决策领域。

papers.title: Correcting Source Mismatch in Flow Matching with Radial-Angular Transport
papers.abstract: Flow Matching is typically built from Gaussian sources and Euclidean probability paths. For heavy-tailed or anisotropic data, however, a Gaussian source induces a structural mismatch already at the level of the radial distribution. We introduce \textit{Radial--Angular Flow Matching (RAFM)}, a framework that explicitly corrects this source mismatch within the standard simulation-free Flow Matching template. RAFM uses a source whose radial law matches that of the data and whose conditional angular distribution is uniform on the sphere, thereby removing the Gaussian radial mismatch by construction. This reduces the remaining transport problem to angular alignment, which leads naturally to conditional paths on scaled spheres defined by spherical geodesic interpolation. The resulting framework yields explicit Flow Matching targets tailored to radial--angular transport without modifying the underlying deterministic training pipeline. We establish the exact density of the matched-radial source, prove a radial--angular KL decomposition that isolates the Gaussian radial penalty, characterize the induced target vector field, and derive a stability result linking Flow Matching error to generation error. We further analyze empirical estimation of the radial law, for which Wasserstein and CDF metrics provide natural guarantees. Empirically, RAFM substantially improves over standard Gaussian Flow Matching and remains competitive with recent non-Gaussian alternatives while preserving a lightweight deterministic training procedure. Overall, RAFM provides a principled source-and-path design for Flow Matching on heavy-tailed and extreme-event data.

analysis.tldr: 提出径向-角流匹配（RAFM），通过匹配数据径向分布并采用球面路径，修正高斯源与重尾/各向异性数据间的结构失配。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准流匹配使用高斯源和欧几里得路径，在处理重尾或各向异性数据时存在径向分布的结构失配，影响生成质量。
analysis.problem: 高斯源与重尾/各向异性数据在径向分布上的不匹配导致流匹配模型性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高斯源的径向分布与真实数据差异显著，尤其在重尾或极端事件数据中，这种失配会引入不必要的传输负担。
analysis.main_method: RAFM使用径向分布与数据匹配、角分布均匀的源，并通过球面测地线插值定义条件路径，将传输问题简化为角对齐。
analysis.key_experiments: 在重尾和极端事件数据上，RAFM显著优于标准高斯流匹配，并与近期非高斯方法竞争，同时保持轻量确定性训练。
analysis.contributions: 提出RAFM框架，理论证明径向-角KL分解、目标向量场及稳定性结果，提供原则性的源与路径设计。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对高维数据的扩展性及角均匀假设的适用边界。

papers.title: Out-of-Air Computation: Enabling Structured Extraction from Wireless Superposition
papers.abstract: Over-the-air computation (AirComp) has traditionally been built on the principle of pre-embedding computation into transmitted waveforms or on exploiting massive antenna arrays, often requiring the wireless multiple-access channel (MAC) to operate under conditions that approximate an ideal computational medium. This paper introduces a new computation framework, termed out-of-air computation (AirCPU), which establishes a joint source-channel coding foundation in which computation is not embedded before transmission but is instead extracted from the wireless superposition by exploiting structured coding. AirCPU operates directly on continuous-valued device data, avoiding the need for a separate source quantization stage, and employs a multi-layer nested lattice architecture that enables progressive resolution by decomposing each input into hierarchically scaled components, all transmitted over a common bounded digital constellation under a fixed power constraint. We formalize the notion of decoupled resolution, showing that in operating regimes where the decoding error probability is sufficiently small, the impact of channel noise and finite constellation constraints on distortion becomes negligible, and the resulting computation error is primarily determined by the target resolution set by the finest lattice. For fading MACs, we further introduce collective and successive computation mechanisms, in addition to the proposed direct computation, which exploit multiple decoded integer-coefficient functions and side-information functions as structural representations of the wireless superposition to significantly expand the reliable operating regime; in this context, we formulate and characterize the underlying reliability conditions and integer optimization problems, and develop a structured low-complexity two-group approximation to address them.

analysis.tldr: 提出“空中计算”新框架AirCPU，利用结构化编码从无线叠加中提取计算，无需预嵌入计算或大规模天线阵列。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统空中计算依赖预嵌入计算或大规模天线阵列，对无线多址信道条件要求苛刻，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需预嵌入计算和理想信道条件下，从无线叠加中高效提取结构化计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当解码错误概率足够小时，信道噪声和有限星座约束对失真的影响可忽略，计算误差主要由最细晶格决定的目标分辨率主导。
analysis.main_method: 采用多层嵌套晶格架构，将连续值数据分解为分层缩放分量，通过固定功率约束的公共有界数字星座传输，实现渐进分辨率提取。
analysis.key_experiments: 针对衰落多址信道，提出直接计算、集体计算和连续计算机制，利用多解码整数系数函数和边信息函数扩展可靠工作区域。
analysis.contributions: 建立了联合源信道编码基础，无需源量化阶段；形式化解耦分辨率概念；提出集体和连续计算机制及低复杂度两群组近似方法。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论实际硬件实现复杂度和延迟开销，且对高动态信道环境的适应性有待验证。

papers.title: A Logical-Rule Autoencoder for Interpretable Recommendations
papers.abstract: Most deep learning recommendation models operate as black boxes, relying on latent representations that obscure their decision process. This lack of intrinsic interpretability raises concerns in applications that require transparency and accountability. In this work, we propose a Logical-rule Interpretable Autoencoder (LIA) for collaborative filtering that is interpretable by design. LIA introduces a learnable logical rule layer in which each rule neuron is equipped with a gate parameter that automatically selects between AND and OR operators during training, enabling the model to discover diverse logical patterns directly from data. To support functional completeness without doubling the input dimensionality, LIA encodes negation through the sign of connection weights, providing a parameter-efficient mechanism for expressing both positive and negated item conditions within each rule. By learning explicit, human-readable reconstruction rules, LIA allows users to directly trace the decision process behind each recommendation. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves improved recommendation performance over traditional baselines while remaining fully interpretable. Code and data are available at https://github.com/weibowen555/LIA.

analysis.tldr: 提出逻辑规则自编码器LIA，通过可学习逻辑规则层实现可解释的协同过滤推荐，兼顾性能与透明度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习推荐模型缺乏内在可解释性，难以满足透明和问责需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既保持高性能又具有内在可解释性的推荐模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统模型依赖隐式表征导致决策过程不透明，而逻辑规则可提供人类可读的决策路径。
analysis.main_method: 在自编码器中引入可学习逻辑规则层，每个规则神经元通过门控参数自动选择AND/OR操作，并用权重符号编码否定。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数据集上与基线方法对比，LIA在保持完全可解释性的同时提升了推荐性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次将可学习逻辑规则与自编码器结合，实现参数高效的逻辑规则发现与可解释推荐。
analysis.limitations: 逻辑规则的可扩展性可能受限于规则数量，复杂场景下规则解释性可能下降。

papers.title: Avoiding Non-Integrable Beliefs in Expectation Propagation
papers.abstract: Expectation Propagation (EP) is a widely used iterative message-passing algorithm that decomposes a global inference problem into multiple local ones. It approximates marginal distributions as ``beliefs'' using intermediate functions called ``messages''. It has been shown that the stationary points of EP are the same as corresponding constrained Bethe Free Energy (BFE) optimization problem. Therefore, EP is an iterative method of optimizing the constrained BFE. However, the iterative method may fall out of the feasible set of the BFE optimization problem, i.e., the beliefs are not integrable. In most literature, the authors use various methods to keep all the messages integrable. In most Bayesian estimation problems, limiting the messages to be integrable shrinks the actual feasible set. Furthermore, in extreme cases where the factors are not integrable, making the message itself integrable is not enough to have integrable beliefs. In this paper, two EP frameworks are proposed to ensure that EP has integrable beliefs. Both of the methods allows non-integrable messages. We then investigate the signal recovery problem in Generalized Linear Model (GLM) using our proposed methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种期望传播（EP）框架，确保信念可积，允许非可积消息，并应用于广义线性模型的信号恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准EP可能产生不可积的信念，导致优化问题脱离可行集，现有方法限制消息可积性会缩小可行集。
analysis.problem: EP迭代中信念可能不可积，影响算法收敛性和可行性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: EP的固定点对应约束Bethe自由能优化，但迭代可能跳出可行集；限制消息可积性在极端情况下不足以保证信念可积。
analysis.main_method: 提出两种EP框架，通过调整消息更新规则确保信念可积，同时允许非可积消息。
analysis.key_experiments: 在广义线性模型（GLM）的信号恢复问题上验证所提方法。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出允许非可积消息的EP框架，保证信念可积，扩展了EP的适用性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论计算复杂度增加或收敛性保证；实验仅针对GLM，泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Towards Unveiling Vulnerabilities of Large Reasoning Models in Machine Unlearning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) possess strong semantic understanding, driving significant progress in data mining applications. This is further enhanced by large reasoning models (LRMs), which provide explicit multi-step reasoning traces. On the other hand, the growing need for the right to be forgotten has driven the development of machine unlearning techniques, which aim to eliminate the influence of specific data from trained models without full retraining. However, unlearning may also introduce new security vulnerabilities by exposing additional interaction surfaces. Although many studies have investigated unlearning attacks, there is no prior work on LRMs. To bridge the gap, we first in this paper propose LRM unlearning attack that forces incorrect final answers while generating convincing but misleading reasoning traces. This objective is challenging due to non-differentiable logical constraints, weak optimization effect over long rationales, and discrete forget set selection. To overcome these challenges, we introduce a bi-level exact unlearning attack that incorporates a differentiable objective function, influential token alignment, and a relaxed indicator strategy. To demonstrate the effectiveness and generalizability of our attack, we also design novel optimization frameworks and conduct comprehensive experiments in both white-box and black-box settings, aiming to raise awareness of the emerging threats to LRM unlearning pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 首次揭示大型推理模型在机器遗忘中的漏洞，提出一种双层精确遗忘攻击方法，生成误导性推理轨迹并导致错误答案。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器遗忘技术可能引入新的安全漏洞，但现有研究未关注大型推理模型（LRM）的遗忘攻击。
analysis.problem: LRM遗忘过程中存在不可微逻辑约束、长推理链优化效果弱和离散遗忘集选择等挑战，导致难以实现有效攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LRM的显式多步推理轨迹在遗忘后可能被利用，生成看似合理但误导性的推理过程，掩盖最终错误答案。
analysis.main_method: 提出双层精确遗忘攻击，包含可微目标函数、关键令牌对齐和松弛指示器策略，以克服优化困难。
analysis.key_experiments: 在白盒和黑盒设置下设计新型优化框架并开展全面实验，验证攻击的有效性和泛化性。
analysis.contributions: 首次研究LRM遗忘攻击，提出创新攻击方法并揭示其威胁，推动对LRM安全性的关注。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论防御机制或实际部署中的计算开销，攻击可能依赖特定模型架构。

papers.title: El Nino Prediction Based on Weather Forecast and Geographical Time-series Data
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel framework for enhancing the prediction accuracy and lead time of El Ni\~no events, crucial for mitigating their global climatic, economic, and societal impacts. Traditional prediction models often rely on oceanic and atmospheric indices, which may lack the granularity or dynamic interplay captured by comprehensive meteorological and geographical datasets. Our framework integrates real-time global weather forecast data with anomalies, subsurface ocean heat content, and atmospheric pressure across various temporal and spatial resolutions. Leveraging a hybrid deep learning architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network for temporal dependency modeling, the framework aims to identify complex precursors and evolving patterns of El Ni\~no events.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合天气预测与地理时空数据的混合深度学习框架，提升厄尔尼诺预测精度与提前期。
analysis.research_motivation: 厄尔尼诺事件对全球气候、经济和社会影响巨大，现有模型依赖海洋大气指数，缺乏对多源动态数据的综合捕捉能力。
analysis.problem: 传统预测模型在数据粒度和动态交互建模上不足，难以准确识别厄尔尼诺事件的复杂前兆和演化模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 厄尔尼诺事件涉及海洋、大气等多要素的时空耦合，单一指数难以反映其非线性演化特征。
analysis.main_method: 构建CNN-LSTM混合架构，CNN提取空间特征，LSTM建模时间依赖，融合实时天气预报、异常数据、海洋热含量和气压等多源数据。
analysis.key_experiments: 利用全球实时天气预报与地理时间序列数据，在不同时空分辨率下验证模型预测性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出集成多源气象地理数据的混合深度学习框架，显著提升厄尔尼诺预测的准确性和提前期。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论模型计算复杂度及对极端事件的泛化能力，可能依赖高质量实时数据。

papers.title: Transmission Neural Networks: Inhibitory and Excitatory Connections
authors: Shuang Gao and Peter E. Caines
papers.abstract: This paper extends the Transmission Neural Network model proposed by Gao and Caines in [1]-[3] to incorporate inhibitory connections and neurotransmitter populations. The extended network model contains binary neuronal states, transmission dynamics, and inhibitory and excitatory connections. Under technical assumptions, we establish the characterization of the firing probabilities of neurons, and show that such a characterization considering inhibitions can be equivalently represented by a neural network where each neuron has a continuous state of dimension 2. Moreover, we incorporated neurotransmitter populations into the modeling and establish the limit network model when the number of neurotransmitters at all synaptic connections go to infinity. Finally, sufficient conditions for stability and contraction properties of the limit network model are established.

analysis.tldr: 将抑制性连接和神经递质群体引入传输神经网络，建立连续状态等价模型并分析极限网络稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有传输神经网络仅考虑兴奋性连接，缺乏对抑制性连接和神经递质群体动态的系统建模。
analysis.problem: 如何将抑制性连接和神经递质群体纳入传输神经网络框架，并分析其动力学特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 抑制性连接的存在使神经元发放概率的刻画可等价为二维连续状态神经网络，神经递质数量趋于无穷时网络呈现极限行为。
analysis.main_method: 通过数学推导建立包含抑制性连接的发放概率表征，引入神经递质群体并证明极限网络模型的存在性，利用稳定性理论分析收缩条件。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及实验，主要基于理论推导和数学证明。
analysis.contributions: 首次将抑制性连接和神经递质群体整合到传输神经网络中，建立了二维连续状态等价模型，并给出了极限网络的稳定性充分条件。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析基于严格技术假设，缺乏实际生物数据验证；未讨论学习规则或应用场景。

papers.title: Learning An Interpretable Risk Scoring System for Maximizing Decision Net Benefit
papers.abstract: Risk scoring systems are widely used in high-stakes domains to assist decision-making. However, existing approaches often focus on optimizing predictive accuracy or likelihood-based criteria, which may not align with the main goal of maximizing utility. In this paper, we propose a novel risk scoring system that directly optimizes net benefit over a range of decision thresholds. The model is formulated as a sparse integer linear programming problem which enables the construction of a transparent scoring system with integer coefficients, and hence, facilitates interpretation and practical application. We also establish fundamental relationships among net benefit, discrimination, and calibration. Our analysis proves that optimizing net benefit also guarantees conventional performance measures. We thoroughly evaluated our method on multiple public datasets as well as on a real-world clinical dataset. This computational study demonstrated that our interpretable method can effectively achieve high net benefit while maintaining competitive discrimination and calibration performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种直接优化净收益的可解释风险评分系统，通过稀疏整数线性规划构建透明模型，兼顾高净收益与判别校准性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有风险评分系统多优化预测准确率或似然准则，未能直接最大化决策效用（净收益），导致实际应用中的效用损失。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个直接优化净收益、同时保持可解释性和良好判别校准性能的风险评分系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 净收益、判别力和校准度之间存在内在关联，优化净收益可隐含保证传统性能指标，但现有方法未充分利用这一关系。
analysis.main_method: 将风险评分建模为稀疏整数线性规划问题，直接优化决策阈值范围内的净收益，生成整数系数的透明评分系统。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个公开数据集和真实临床数据集上评估，对比现有方法，验证了所提方法在高净收益的同时保持竞争性判别和校准性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出直接优化净收益的可解释评分系统；理论证明了净收益与判别、校准的关系；实验验证了实用性和有效性。
analysis.limitations: 稀疏整数线性规划可能在大规模特征或数据上计算成本较高；净收益优化依赖于决策阈值范围的预设。

papers.title: Peoples Water Data: Enabling Reliable Field Data Generation and Microbial Contamination Screening in Household Drinking Water
papers.abstract: Unsafe drinking water remains a major public health concern globally, particularly in low-resource regions where routine microbiological surveillance is limited. Although Escherichia coli is the internationally recognized indicator of fecal contamination, laboratory-based testing is often inaccessible at scale. In this study, we developed and evaluated a two-stage machine-learning framework for predicting E. coli presence in decentralized household point-of-use drinking water in Chennai, India using low-cost physicochemical and contextual indicators. The dataset comprised 3,023 samples collected under the Peoples Water Data initiative; after harmonization, technical cleaning, and outlier screening, 2,207 valid samples were retained. This framework provides a scalable decision-support tool for prioritizing microbiological testing in resource-constrained environments and addresses an important gap in point-of-use contamination risk assessment. Beyond predictive modeling, the present study was conducted within an AI-supported field implementation framework that combined student-facing guidance and real-time QC to improve protocol adherence, traceability, and data reliability in decentralized household water monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段机器学习框架，利用低成本理化指标预测家庭饮用水中的大肠杆菌污染，支持资源受限地区的微生物检测优先级排序。
analysis.research_motivation: 不安全饮用水是全球公共卫生问题，尤其在低资源地区缺乏常规微生物监测，而实验室检测难以大规模普及。
analysis.problem: 如何利用低成本、易获取的理化指标和情境数据，可靠预测分散式家庭饮用水中的大肠杆菌污染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统微生物检测依赖实验室，成本高且难以覆盖分散家庭；而理化指标与大肠杆菌存在潜在关联，但需有效建模。
analysis.main_method: 构建两阶段机器学习框架，结合学生指导与实时质量控制，提升数据可靠性，并利用3,023个样本（清洗后2,207个有效）进行预测建模。
analysis.key_experiments: 在印度金奈收集3,023个家庭饮用水样本，经数据协调、清洗和异常值筛选后保留2,207个，评估模型预测大肠杆菌的能力。
analysis.contributions: 提出可扩展的决策支持工具，填补了分散式家庭饮用水污染风险评估的空白，并整合AI支持的现场数据收集框架。
analysis.limitations: 依赖特定地区数据，模型泛化性需验证；预测精度可能受限于低成本指标的间接性。

papers.title: Subspace Control: Turning Constrained Model Steering into Controllable Spectral Optimization
papers.abstract: Foundation models, such as large language models (LLMs), are powerful but often require customization before deployment to satisfy practical constraints such as safety, privacy, and task-specific requirements, leading to "constrained" optimization problems for model steering and adaptation. However, solving such problems remains largely underexplored and is particularly challenging due to interference between the primary objective and constraint objectives during optimization. In this paper, we propose a subspace control framework for constrained model training. Specifically, (i) we first analyze, from a model merging perspective, how spectral cross-task interference arises and show that it can be resolved via a one-shot solution that orthogonalizes the merged subspace; (ii) we establish a connection between this solution and gradient orthogonalization in the spectral optimizer Muon; and (iii) building on these insights, we introduce SIFT (spectral interference-free training), which leverages a localization scheme to selectively intervene during optimization, enabling controllable updates that mitigate objective-constraint conflicts. We evaluate SIFT across four representative applications: (a) machine unlearning, (b) safety alignment, (c) text-to-speech adaptation, and (d) hallucination mitigation. Compared to both control-based and control-free baselines, SIFT consistently achieves substantial and robust performance improvements across all tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/OPTML-Group/SIFT.

analysis.tldr: 提出子空间控制框架SIFT，通过谱优化实现约束模型训练中目标与约束的无干扰协同优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型部署需满足安全、隐私等约束，但现有方法难以处理主目标与约束目标间的优化干扰。
analysis.problem: 约束模型训练中主目标与约束目标之间的优化干扰问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从模型合并视角发现跨任务谱干扰，并证明可通过正交化合并子空间的一步解法消除。
analysis.main_method: 提出SIFT框架，结合谱优化器Muon的梯度正交化与定位方案，在优化中选择性干预以缓解目标冲突。
analysis.key_experiments: 在机器遗忘、安全对齐、文本转语音适应和幻觉缓解四个任务上评估，相比基线方法取得一致且显著的性能提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次从谱优化角度系统解决约束模型训练中的目标干扰问题，提出可控制更新框架SIFT。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论大规模模型或极端约束场景下的计算开销与扩展性。

papers.title: CAWN: Continuous Acoustic Wave Networks for Autoregressive Language Modeling
papers.abstract: Modern Large Language Models (LLMs) rely on Transformer self-attention, which scales quadratically with sequence length. Recent linear-time alternatives, like State Space Models (SSMs), often suffer from signal degradation over extended contexts. We introduce the Continuous Acoustic Wave Network (CAWN), a fully continuous sequence-mixing architecture. Instead of discrete matrix-based attention, CAWN projects hidden states into multi-headed complex-domain phasors, achieving sequence mixing through a causal, $O(L)$ Phase Accumulation mechanism. To prevent signal degradation over ultra-long contexts, we introduce a dual-gated Selective Phase Resonance mechanism incorporating Frequency-Dependent Retention, Hard-Threshold Gating via Straight-Through Estimation, and a Temporal Syntax Cache to capture short-term local dependencies. We also replace standard dense linear projections with Depth-wise Harmonic Convolutions for optimal spatial frequency mixing, augmented by Block Attention Residuals for depth-wise state routing. Scaled to a 150M-parameter model, CAWN utilizes custom Triton kernels for hardware-efficient, true-complex phase accumulation in float32. Trained via a continuous streaming loop on a 100-Billion-token corpus, the prototype is evaluated at a 5-Billion-token milestone. Empirical evaluations via a Targeted Semantic Retrieval protocol demonstrate robust vocabulary acquisition and extended explicitly learned contextual denoising. By leveraging $O(1)$ state-passing via chunked prefill, the model retrieves targeted information across 2,000,000 tokens while strictly plateauing at 8.72 GB of Peak VRAM, empirically overcoming the $O(L^2)$ context memory wall.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续声波网络（CAWN），用复数域相量替代注意力机制，实现线性复杂度序列建模，在200万token上下文中保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer的二次复杂度限制长上下文处理，而线性替代方案（如SSM）存在信号退化问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种线性复杂度的序列混合架构，避免长上下文中的信号退化，并突破O(L²)的内存墙。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离散矩阵注意力在长序列中计算和内存开销大，而连续域相量机制可自然实现因果序列混合且复杂度线性。
analysis.main_method: 将隐藏状态投影为多头复数域相量，通过因果相位累积（O(L)）实现序列混合，并引入双门控选择性相位共振机制防止信号退化。
analysis.key_experiments: 150M参数模型在1000亿token语料上训练，500亿token里程碑评估，通过目标语义检索协议在200万token上下文中验证，峰值VRAM仅8.72GB。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个全连续序列混合架构CAWN，实现O(1)状态传递和O(L)复杂度，实证突破长上下文内存墙。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估150M参数规模，未在更大模型（如1B+）上验证；依赖自定义Triton内核，通用性受限。

papers.title: Precise Robot Command Understanding Using Grammar-Constrained Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Human-robot collaboration in industrial settings requires precise and reliable communication to enhance operational efficiency. While Large Language Models (LLMs) understand general language, they often lack the domain-specific rigidity needed for safe and executable industrial commands. To address this gap, this paper introduces a novel grammar-constrained LLM that integrates a grammar-driven Natural Language Understanding (NLU) system with a fine-tuned LLM, which enables both conversational flexibility and the deterministic precision required in robotics. Our method employs a two-stage process. First, a fine-tuned LLM performs high-level contextual reasoning and parameter inference on natural language inputs. Second, a Structured Language Model (SLM) and a grammar-based canonicalizer constrain the LLM's output, forcing it into a standardized symbolic format composed of valid action frames and command elements. This process guarantees that generated commands are valid and structured in a robot-readable JSON format. A key feature of the proposed model is a validation and feedback loop. A grammar parser validates the output against a predefined list of executable robotic actions. If a command is invalid, the system automatically generates corrective prompts and re-engages the LLM. This iterative self-correction mechanism allows the model to recover from initial interpretation errors to improve system robustness. We evaluate our grammar-constrained hybrid model against two baselines: a fine-tuned API-based LLM and a standalone grammar-driven NLU model. Using the Human Robot Interaction Corpus (HuRIC) dataset, we demonstrate that the hybrid approach achieves superior command validity, which promotes safer and more effective industrial human-robot collaboration.

analysis.tldr: 提出语法约束的LLM，结合NLU与微调LLM，通过两阶段处理和自纠正机制，实现工业机器人命令的精确理解与生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业人机协作需要精确可靠的通信，但通用LLM缺乏领域特定刚性，无法保证命令的安全性和可执行性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在保持对话灵活性的同时，生成符合工业机器人语法约束的精确命令。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用LLM能理解自然语言，但输出常偏离工业领域预定义动作格式，导致命令无效或危险。
analysis.main_method: 两阶段流程：微调LLM进行上下文推理和参数推断，再通过结构化语言模型和语法规范化器将输出约束为机器人可读的JSON格式，并引入验证反馈循环自动纠正错误。
analysis.key_experiments: 在HuRIC数据集上，将语法约束混合模型与微调API-LLM和独立语法驱动NLU模型对比，评估命令有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出语法约束混合模型，结合LLM灵活性与语法确定性，实现工业命令的精确生成和自纠正。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义动作列表和语法规则，可能限制对新场景的泛化；未讨论计算开销和实时性。

papers.title: Learning-Based Multi-Criteria Decision Making Model for Sawmill Location Problems
papers.abstract: Strategically locating a sawmill is vital for enhancing the efficiency, profitability, and sustainability of timber supply chains. Our study proposes a Learning-Based Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (LB-MCDM) framework that integrates machine learning (ML) with GIS-based spatial location analysis via MCDM. The proposed framework provides a data-driven, unbiased, and replicable approach to assessing site suitability. We demonstrate the utility of the proposed model through a case study in Mississippi (MS). We apply five ML algorithms (Random Forest Classifier, Support Vector Classifier, XGBoost Classifier, Logistic Regression, and K-Nearest Neighbors Classifier) to identify the most suitable sawmill locations in Mississippi. Among these models, the Random Forest Classifier achieved the highest performance. We use the SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) technique to determine the relative importance of each criterion, revealing the Supply-Demand Ratio, a composite feature that reflects local market competition dynamics, as the most influential factor, followed by Road, Rail Line and Urban Area Distance. The validation of suitability maps generated by our LB-MCDM model suggests that 10-11% of the MS landscape is highly suitable for sawmill location.

analysis.tldr: 提出学习型多准则决策框架，结合机器学习和GIS，通过案例研究确定锯木厂最佳选址。
analysis.research_motivation: 锯木厂选址对木材供应链效率、盈利和可持续性至关重要，现有方法缺乏数据驱动和可复制性。
analysis.problem: 如何客观、可重复地评估锯木厂选址适宜性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 供需比是影响选址的最关键因素，其次是道路、铁路和城市距离。
analysis.main_method: 集成五种机器学习分类器（随机森林最优）与GIS空间分析，并用SHAP解释特征重要性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在密西西比州案例中，随机森林表现最佳，生成适宜性地图显示10-11%区域高度适宜。
analysis.contributions: 提出数据驱动、无偏的LB-MCDM框架，并揭示供需比的关键作用。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一州案例，可能不适用于其他地区；未考虑动态经济因素。

papers.title: Sharp asymptotic theory for Q-learning with LDTZ learning rate and its generalization
papers.abstract:
Despite the sustained popularity of Q-learning as a practical tool for policy determination, a majority of relevant theoretical literature deals with either constant ($\eta_{t}\equiv \eta$) or polynomially decaying ($\eta_{t} = \eta t^{-\alpha}$) learning schedules. However, it is well known that these choices suffer from either persistent bias or prohibitively slow convergence. In contrast, the recently proposed linear decay to zero (	exttt{LD2Z}: $\eta_{t,n}=\eta(1-t/n)$) schedule has shown appreciable empirical performance, but its theoretical and statistical properties remain largely unexplored, especially in the Q-learning setting. We address this gap in the literature by first considering a general class of power-law decay to zero (	exttt{PD2Z}-$
u$: $\eta_{t,n}=\eta(1-t/n)^{
u}$). Proceeding step-by-step, we present a sharp non-asymptotic error bound for Q-learning with 	exttt{PD2Z}-$
u$ schedule, which then is used to derive a central limit theory for a new 	extit{tail} Polyak-Ruppert averaging estimator. Finally, we also provide a novel time-uniform Gaussian approximation (also known as 	extit{strong invariance principle}) for the partial sum process of Q-learning iterates, which facilitates bootstrap-based inference. All our theoretical results are complemented by extensive numerical experiments. Beyond being new theoretical and statistical contributions to the Q-learning literature, our results definitively establish that 	exttt{LD2Z} and in general 	exttt{PD2Z}-$
u$ achieve a best-of-both-worlds property: they inherit the rapid decay from initialization (characteristic of constant step-sizes) while retaining the asymptotic convergence guarantees (characteristic of polynomially decaying schedules). This dual advantage explains the empirical success of 	exttt{LD2Z} while providing practical guidelines for inference through our results.

analysis.tldr: 本文为线性衰减至零（LD2Z）学习率的Q-learning提供了严格的渐近理论，证明其兼具快速收敛和渐近保证的双重优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Q-learning理论多关注常数或多项式衰减学习率，但LD2Z学习率虽经验表现优异，其理论性质尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LD2Z及一般幂律衰减至零（PD2Z）学习率在Q-learning中的非渐近误差界和渐近分布理论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LD2Z学习率能同时实现快速初始衰减（类似常数步长）和渐近收敛保证（类似多项式衰减），克服了二者的各自缺陷。
analysis.main_method: 提出PD2Z-ν学习率族，推导其非渐近误差界，并基于尾部Polyak-Ruppert平均估计建立中心极限定理和时间一致高斯近似。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过大量数值实验验证了理论结果，包括误差界、渐近分布和自助法推断的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 首次为LD2Z/PD2Z学习率提供严格渐近理论，揭示其最佳双赢特性，并给出实用推断指南。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析限于表格型Q-learning，未扩展到函数逼近或深度Q网络场景。

papers.title: Stable and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Educational Data with Empirical Marginals: A Copula-Based Approach
papers.abstract: To advance Educational Data Mining (EDM) within strict privacy-protecting regulatory frameworks, researchers must develop methods that enable data-driven analysis while protecting sensitive student information. Synthetic data generation is one such approach, enabling the release of statistically generated samples instead of real student records; however, existing deep learning and parametric generators often distort marginal distributions and degrade under iterative regeneration, leading to distribution drift and progressive loss of distributional support that compromise reliability. In response, we introduce the Non-Parametric Gaussian Copula (NPGC), a plug-and-play synthesis method that replaces deep learning and parametric optimization with empirical statistical anchoring to preserve the observed marginal distributions while modeling dependencies through a copula framework. NPGC integrates Differential Privacy (DP) at both the marginal and correlation levels, supports heterogeneous variable types, and treats missing data as an explicit state to retain informative absence patterns. We evaluate NPGC against deep learning and parametric baselines on five benchmark datasets and demonstrate that it remains stable across multiple regeneration cycles and achieves competitive downstream performance at substantially lower computational cost. We further validate NPGC through deployment in a real-world online learning platform, demonstrating its practicality for privacy-preserving research.

analysis.tldr: 提出非参数高斯Copula方法，用于生成稳定且隐私保护的教育合成数据，避免分布漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育数据挖掘需在严格隐私法规下进行，现有合成数据方法存在分布失真和迭代退化问题。
analysis.problem: 深度学习和参数化生成器在多次再生中导致边际分布扭曲和分布支持丢失，降低可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在迭代再生时出现分布漂移，逐步丧失对原始数据分布的支持。
analysis.main_method: 非参数高斯Copula（NPGC）通过经验统计锚定保留边际分布，并用Copula框架建模依赖关系，集成差分隐私。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五个基准数据集上对比深度学习和参数化基线，并在真实在线学习平台部署验证。
analysis.contributions: 提出稳定、隐私保护的合成数据方法，支持异构变量和缺失数据，计算成本低。
analysis.limitations: 可能未充分评估复杂依赖结构或极端隐私预算下的性能。

papers.title: DARE: Diffusion Large Language Models Alignment and Reinforcement Executor
papers.abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as a compelling alternative to dominant autoregressive models, replacing strictly sequential token generation with iterative denoising and parallel generation dynamics. However, their open-source ecosystem remains fragmented across model families and, in particular, across post-training pipelines, where reinforcement learning objectives, rollout implementations and evaluation scripts are often released as paper-specific codebases. This fragmentation slows research iteration, raises the engineering burden of reproduction, and makes fair comparison across algorithms difficult. We present \textbf{DARE} (\textbf{d}LLMs \textbf{A}lignment and \textbf{R}einforcement \textbf{E}xecutor), an open framework for post-training and evaluating dLLMs. Built on top of verl~\cite{sheng2024hybridflow} and OpenCompass~\cite{2023opencompass}, DARE unifies supervised fine-tuning, parameter-efficient fine-tuning, preference optimization, and dLLM-specific reinforcement learning under a shared execution stack for both masked and block diffusion language models. Across representative model families including LLaDA, Dream, SDAR, and LLaDA2.x, DARE provides broad algorithmic coverage, reproducible benchmark evaluation, and practical acceleration. Extensive empirical results position that DARE serves as a reusable research substrate for developing, comparing, and deploying post-training methods for current and emerging dLLMs.

analysis.tldr: DARE 是一个统一的后训练框架，用于扩散大语言模型的对齐和强化学习，支持多种模型和算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散大语言模型的后训练代码分散，导致复现困难、比较不公平，阻碍研究进展。
analysis.problem: 现有扩散大语言模型的后训练生态碎片化，缺乏统一框架来支持公平比较和高效复现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散大语言模型的后训练代码通常与特定论文绑定，导致算法实现、评估脚本等不兼容。
analysis.main_method: 基于 verl 和 OpenCompass 构建统一执行栈，集成监督微调、参数高效微调、偏好优化和强化学习。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 LLaDA、Dream、SDAR 和 LLaDA2.x 等模型上验证，涵盖多种后训练算法和加速技术。
analysis.contributions: 提供可复用的研究基础，支持公平比较和部署当前及新兴扩散大语言模型的后训练方法。
analysis.limitations: 可能未覆盖所有扩散模型变体，且依赖现有库的兼容性。

papers.title: Relay-Assisted Activation-Integrated SIM for Wireless Physical Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Wireless physical neural networks (WPNNs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for performing neural computation directly in the physical layer of wireless systems, offering low latency and high energy efficiency. However, most existing WPNN implementations primarily rely on linear physical transformations, which fundamentally limits their expressiveness. In this work, we propose a relay-assisted WPNN architecture based on activation-integrated stacked intelligent metasurfaces (AI-SIMs), where each passive metasurface layer enabling linear wave manipulation is cascaded with an activation metasurface layer that realizes nonlinear processing in the analog domain. By deliberately structuring multi-hop wireless propagation, the relay amplification matrix and the metasurface phase-shift matrices jointly act as trainable network weights, while hardware-implemented activation functions provide essential nonlinearity. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves high classification accuracy, and that incorporating hardware-based activation functions significantly improves representational capability and performance compared with purely linear physical implementations.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于激活集成智能超表面的中继辅助无线物理神经网络，通过硬件非线性激活函数提升表达能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无线物理神经网络主要依赖线性物理变换，限制了模型表达能力，需要引入非线性机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在线性无线物理层中实现高效的非线性神经计算，以提升网络性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯线性物理变换无法捕获复杂模式，而硬件实现的激活函数可提供必要非线性，显著改善分类精度。
analysis.main_method: 采用激活集成堆叠智能超表面架构，每层被动超表面后级联激活超表面，中继放大矩阵与超表面相位矩阵作为可训练权重。
analysis.key_experiments: 仿真实验验证了所提架构在高分类精度上的优势，并与纯线性物理实现对比，显示硬件激活函数带来的性能提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次将硬件激活函数集成到无线物理神经网络中，提出中继辅助的AI-SIM架构，实现非线性模拟处理。
analysis.limitations: 仅通过仿真验证，未考虑实际硬件噪声和部署误差；激活函数的具体硬件实现细节未深入讨论。

papers.title: Towards Agentic Defect Reasoning: A Graph-Assisted Retrieval Framework for Laser Powder Bed Fusion
papers.abstract: Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) is highly sensitive to process parameters, which influence defect formation through complex thermal and fluid mechanisms. However, defect-related knowledge is dispersed across the literature, limiting systematic understanding. This study presents a graph-assisted retrieval framework for defect reasoning in LPBF, using Ti6Al4V as a case study. Scientific publications are transformed into a structured representation, and relationships between parameters, mechanisms, and defects are encoded into an evidence-linked knowledge graph. The framework integrates semantic and graph-based retrieval, supported by a lightweight agent-based reasoning layer to construct interpretable defect pathways. Evaluation shows high retrieval accuracy (0.9667) and recall (0.9667), demonstrating effective identification of relevant defect related evidence. The framework enables transparent reasoning chains linking process parameters to defects. This work provides a scalable approach for converting unstructured literature into a query able and interpretable knowledge resource for additive manufacturing.

analysis.tldr: 提出图辅助检索框架，将LPBF缺陷文献转化为知识图谱，实现可解释的缺陷推理。
analysis.research_motivation: LPBF缺陷知识分散于文献中，缺乏系统性理解，需要结构化方法整合知识。
analysis.problem: 如何从非结构化文献中提取并关联工艺参数、机制与缺陷，构建可查询的推理路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 缺陷形成涉及复杂热-流体机制，参数与缺陷间关系隐含且多源，现有检索难以支持因果推理。
analysis.main_method: 构建证据链接知识图谱，结合语义检索与图检索，并加入轻量级智能体推理层生成缺陷路径。
analysis.key_experiments: 以Ti6Al4V为案例，评估显示检索准确率0.9667，召回率0.9667，有效识别缺陷相关证据。
analysis.contributions: 提供将非结构化文献转化为可查询、可解释知识资源的可扩展方法，支持透明推理链。
analysis.limitations: 仅以单一材料为案例，泛化性待验证；智能体推理层可能依赖图谱质量。

papers.title: A Semi-Automated Annotation Workflow for Paediatric Histopathology Reports Using Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Electronic Patient Record (EPR) systems contain valuable clinical information, but much of it is trapped in unstructured text, limiting its use for research and decision-making. Large language models can extract such information but require substantial computational resources to run locally, and sending sensitive clinical data to cloud-based services, even when deidentified, raises significant patient privacy concerns. In this study, we develop a resource-efficient semi-automated annotation workflow using small language models (SLMs) to extract structured information from unstructured EPR data, focusing on paediatric histopathology reports. As a proof-of-concept, we apply the workflow to paediatric renal biopsy reports, a domain chosen for its constrained diagnostic scope and well-defined underlying biology. We develop the workflow iteratively with clinical oversight across three meetings, manually annotating 400 reports from a dataset of 2,111 at Great Ormond Street Hospital as a gold standard, while developing an automated information extraction approach using SLMs. We frame extraction as a Question-Answering task grounded by clinician-guided entity guidelines and few-shot examples, evaluating five instruction-tuned SLMs with a disagreement modelling framework to prioritise reports for clinical review. Gemma 2 2B achieves the highest accuracy at 84.3%, outperforming off-the-shelf models including spaCy (74.3%), BioBERT-SQuAD (62.3%), RoBERTa-SQuAD (59.7%), and GLiNER (60.2%). Entity guidelines improved performance by 7-19% over the zero-shot baseline, and few-shot examples by 6-38%, though their benefits do not compound when combined. These results demonstrate that SLMs can extract structured information from specialised clinical domains on CPU-only infrastructure with minimal clinician involvement. Our code is available at https://github.com/gosh-dre/nlp_renal_biopsy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种半自动标注流程，用小语言模型从儿科病理报告中提取结构化信息，在CPU上高效运行。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子病历中的非结构化文本难以用于研究，而大语言模型计算成本高且存在隐私风险。
analysis.problem: 如何用资源高效的方式从儿科病理报告中提取结构化信息，同时保护患者隐私。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小语言模型在特定临床领域（如儿科肾活检）中，通过实体指南和少样本示例可显著提升性能，但两者结合效果不叠加。
analysis.main_method: 将信息提取建模为问答任务，结合临床医生指导的实体指南和少样本示例，使用分歧建模框架优先处理需审查的报告。
analysis.key_experiments: 在2111份报告中手动标注400份作为金标准，评估5个指令微调小语言模型，Gemma 2 2B准确率达84.3%。
analysis.contributions: 展示了小语言模型在CPU上高效提取临床信息的能力，减少对云端和大模型的依赖。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对儿科肾活检报告，泛化性未验证；少样本示例与实体指南结合时性能未提升。

papers.title: Which Leakage Types Matter?
papers.abstract: Twenty-eight within-subject counterfactual experiments across 2,047 tabular datasets, plus a boundary experiment on 129 temporal datasets, measuring the severity of four data leakage classes in machine learning. Class I (estimation - fitting scalers on full data) is negligible: all nine conditions produce $|\Delta\text{AUC}| \leq 0.005$. Class II (selection - peeking, seed cherry-picking) is substantial: ~90% of the measured effect is noise exploitation that inflates reported scores. Class III (memorization) scales with model capacity: d_z = 0.37 (Naive Bayes) to 1.11 (Decision Tree). Class IV (boundary) is invisible under random CV. The textbook emphasis is inverted: normalization leakage matters least; selection leakage at practical dataset sizes matters most.

analysis.tldr: 通过大规模实验发现，数据泄露中特征缩放泄露影响极小，而选择泄露（如偷看数据）影响最大，颠覆了教科书中的常见认知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究对数据泄露类型的严重程度缺乏系统比较，尤其是实际场景中不同泄露类型的相对影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 量化四种数据泄露类型（估计、选择、记忆、边界）在机器学习中的实际影响，并确定哪些类型最值得关注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征缩放泄露（I类）几乎无影响（|ΔAUC|≤0.005），而选择泄露（II类）通过噪声利用显著膨胀报告分数（约90%效应），记忆泄露（III类）随模型容量增加，边界泄露（IV类）在随机交叉验证下不可见。
analysis.main_method: 在2047个表格数据集上进行了28个被试内反事实实验，并在129个时间序列数据集上进行了边界实验，测量四种泄露类型的严重程度。
analysis.key_experiments: 包含9种条件测试I类泄露，II类泄露测量噪声利用比例，III类泄露比较不同模型（朴素贝叶斯d_z=0.37，决策树d_z=1.11），IV类泄露在随机CV下测试。
analysis.contributions: 系统揭示了不同数据泄露类型的实际影响差异，纠正了教科书对特征缩放泄露的过度强调，并指出选择泄露是实际中最严重的问题。
analysis.limitations: 实验主要基于表格数据和时间序列数据，未覆盖图像、文本等其他模态；结果可能受数据集规模和模型选择影响。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Foundation Models for Clinical Data
papers.abstract: Healthcare foundation models have largely followed paradigms from natural language processing and computer vision, emphasizing large scale pretraining and deterministic representations over heterogeneous clinical data.
